 5220|       |#[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5221|       |const MERMAID_INIT_SNIPPET: &str = r##"
 5222|       |if (window.mermaid && mermaid.mermaidAPI) {
 5223|       |  mermaid.mermaidAPI.initialize({startOnLoad: false});
 5224|       |  window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object = function(value) {
 5225|       |    return value && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value);
 5226|       |  };
 5227|       |  window.__mdmdview_merge_config = function(baseConfig, overrideConfig) {
 5228|       |    var out = {};
 5229|       |    function assign(target, source) {
 5230|       |      if (!window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object(source)) { return; }
 5231|       |      for (var key in source) {
 5232|       |        if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(source, key)) { continue; }
 5233|       |        var value = source[key];
 5234|       |        if (window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object(value)) {
 5235|       |          if (!window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object(target[key])) { target[key] = {}; }
 5236|       |          assign(target[key], value);
 5237|       |        } else if (Array.isArray(value)) {
 5238|       |          target[key] = value.slice();
 5239|       |        } else {
 5240|       |          target[key] = value;
 5241|       |        }
 5242|       |      }
 5243|       |    }
 5244|       |    assign(out, baseConfig);
 5245|       |    assign(out, overrideConfig);
 5246|       |    return out;
 5247|       |  };
 5248|       |  window.__mdmdview_sanitize_config = function(cfg) {
 5249|       |    if (!window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object(cfg)) { return null; }
 5250|       |    var disallowed = {
 5251|       |      securityLevel: true,
 5252|       |      startOnLoad: true,
 5253|       |      maxTextSize: true,
 5254|       |      deterministicIds: true,
 5255|       |      deterministicIDSeed: true,
 5256|       |      htmlLabels: true,
 5257|       |      themeCSS: true,
 5258|       |      dompurifyConfig: true,
 5259|       |      secure: true
 5260|       |    };
 5261|       |    var out = {};
 5262|       |    for (var key in cfg) {
 5263|       |      if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(cfg, key)) { continue; }
 5264|       |      if (key.indexOf('__') === 0 || key.indexOf('proto') >= 0 || key.indexOf('constructor') >= 0) {
 5265|       |        continue;
 5266|       |      }
 5267|       |      if (disallowed[key]) { continue; }
 5268|       |      var value = cfg[key];
 5269|       |      if (window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object(value)) {
 5270|       |        var nested = window.__mdmdview_sanitize_config(value);
 5271|       |        if (nested && Object.keys(nested).length) { out[key] = nested; }
 5272|       |      } else if (Array.isArray(value)) {
 5273|       |        out[key] = value.slice();
 5274|       |      } else {
 5275|       |        out[key] = value;
 5276|       |      }
 5277|       |    }
 5278|       |    if (out.themeVariables && window.__mdmdview_is_plain_object(out.themeVariables)) {
 5279|       |      for (var tvKey in out.themeVariables) {
 5280|       |        if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(out.themeVariables, tvKey)) { continue; }
 5281|       |        var tvVal = out.themeVariables[tvKey];
 5282|       |        if (typeof tvVal === 'string') {
 5283|       |          if (!tvVal.match(/^[\d "#%(),.;A-Za-z-]+$/)) {
 5284|       |            delete out.themeVariables[tvKey];
 5285|       |          }
 5286|       |        }
 5287|       |      }
 5288|       |    }
 5289|       |    return out;
 5290|       |  };
 5291|       |  window.__mdmdview_extract_init = function(code) {
 5292|       |    if (typeof code !== 'string') { return { code: code, config: null }; }
 5293|       |    var initRe = /%%\{\s*init\s*:\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*\}%%/g;
 5294|       |    var found = null;
 5295|       |    var cleaned = code.replace(initRe, function(match, json) {
 5296|       |      if (found === null) {
 5297|       |        try { found = JSON.parse(json); } catch (e) { found = null; }
 5298|       |      }
 5299|       |      return '';
 5300|       |    });
 5301|       |    return { code: cleaned, config: found };
 5302|       |  };
 5303|       |} else {
 5304|       |  throw new Error('Mermaid not available');
 5305|       |}
 5306|       |"##;
 5307|       |
 5308|       |#[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5309|       |const MERMAID_RENDER_WRAPPER: &str = r#"
 5310|       |(function(id, code, siteConfigJson, viewportWidth, viewportHeight){
 5311|       |  if (typeof __mdmdview_reset_dom === 'function') {
 5312|       |    __mdmdview_reset_dom();
 5313|       |  }
 5314|       |  if (typeof viewportWidth === 'number' && viewportWidth > 0) {
 5315|       |    window.__mdmdview_viewport_width = viewportWidth;
 5316|       |  }
 5317|       |  if (typeof viewportHeight === 'number' && viewportHeight > 0) {
 5318|       |    window.__mdmdview_viewport_height = viewportHeight;
 5319|       |  }
 5320|       |  var siteConfig = {};
 5321|       |  if (typeof siteConfigJson === 'string' && siteConfigJson.length > 0) {
 5322|       |    try { siteConfig = JSON.parse(siteConfigJson); } catch (e) { siteConfig = {}; }
 5323|       |  }
 5324|       |  var extracted = window.__mdmdview_extract_init(code);
 5325|       |  var directiveConfig = window.__mdmdview_sanitize_config(extracted.config) || {};
 5326|       |  var merged = window.__mdmdview_merge_config(directiveConfig, siteConfig);
 5327|       |  var allowHtmlLabels = merged && merged.__mdmdviewAllowHtmlLabels === true;
 5328|       |  if (allowHtmlLabels) {
 5329|       |    merged.htmlLabels = true;
 5330|       |    if (!merged.flowchart) { merged.flowchart = {}; }
 5331|       |    merged.flowchart.htmlLabels = true;
 5332|       |    delete merged.__mdmdviewAllowHtmlLabels;
 5333|       |  }
 5334|       |  if (merged && merged.securityLevel === 'strict' && !allowHtmlLabels) {
 5335|       |    merged.htmlLabels = false;
 5336|       |    if (!merged.flowchart) { merged.flowchart = {}; }
 5337|       |    merged.flowchart.htmlLabels = false;
 5338|       |  }
 5339|       |  function __mdmdview_flush_timers() {
 5340|       |    if (typeof __mdmdview_run_timers !== 'function') { return; }
 5341|       |    var remaining = 0;
 5342|       |    var cycles = 0;
 5343|       |    do {
 5344|       |      remaining = __mdmdview_run_timers(1000);
 5345|       |      cycles++;
 5346|       |    } while (remaining > 0 && cycles < 100);
 5347|       |    if (remaining > 0) { throw new Error('Mermaid timer queue did not drain'); }
 5348|       |  }
 5349|       |  function __mdmdview_pump_timers(max_cycles) {
 5350|       |    var cycles = 0;
 5351|       |    function step() {
 5352|       |      if (typeof __mdmdview_run_timers !== 'function') {
 5353|       |        return Promise.resolve();
 5354|       |      }
 5355|       |      var remaining = __mdmdview_run_timers(1000);
 5356|       |      cycles++;
 5357|       |      if (remaining > 0 && cycles < max_cycles) {
 5358|       |        return Promise.resolve().then(step);
 5359|       |      }
 5360|       |      if (remaining > 0) {
 5361|       |        return Promise.reject(new Error('Mermaid timer queue did not drain'));
 5362|       |      }
 5363|       |      return Promise.resolve();
 5364|       |    }
 5365|       |    return step();
 5366|       |  }
 5367|       |  mermaid.mermaidAPI.initialize(merged);
 5368|       |  var renderCode = extracted && extracted.code !== undefined ? extracted.code : code;
 5369|       |  var svgOut = null;
 5370|       |  var renderResult = null;
 5371|       |  try {
 5372|       |    renderResult = mermaid.mermaidAPI.render(id, renderCode, function(svg){ svgOut = svg; });
 5373|       |    __mdmdview_flush_timers();
 5374|       |  } catch (err) {
 5375|       |    throw err;
 5376|       |  }
 5377|       |  if (renderResult && typeof renderResult.then === 'function') {
 5378|       |    var pump = __mdmdview_pump_timers(400);
 5379|       |    return Promise.all([renderResult, pump]).then(function(values){
 5380|       |      __mdmdview_flush_timers();
 5381|       |      var out = values && values.length ? values[0] : null;
 5382|       |      if (typeof out === 'string') { return out; }
 5383|       |      if (out && out.svg) { return out.svg; }
 5384|       |      if (typeof svgOut === 'string' && svgOut.length > 0) { return svgOut; }
 5385|       |      throw new Error('Mermaid render returned empty');
 5386|       |    });
 5387|       |  }
 5388|       |  if (typeof renderResult === 'string') { return renderResult; }
 5389|       |  if (renderResult && renderResult.svg) { return renderResult.svg; }
 5390|       |  if (typeof svgOut === 'string' && svgOut.length > 0) { return svgOut; }
 5391|       |  throw new Error('Mermaid render returned empty');
 5392|       |})

 5405|       |            .get_or_init(|| Mutex::new(()))
 5406|       |            .lock()

 5457|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5458|       |    #[test]
 5459|       |    fn test_current_thread_override_matches_handles_poisoned_and_would_block() {
 5460|       |        let poisoned = std::sync::Mutex::new(Some(std::thread::current().id()));
 5461|       |        let _ = std::panic::catch_unwind(std::panic::AssertUnwindSafe(|| {
 5462|       |            let _guard = poisoned.lock().expect("poison source lock");
 5463|       |            panic!("poison override mutex");
 5464|       |        }));
 5465|       |        assert!(current_thread_override_matches(&poisoned));
 5466|       |        poisoned.clear_poison();
 5467|       |
 5468|       |        let blocked = Arc::new(std::sync::Mutex::new(Some(std::thread::current().id())));
 5469|       |        let (locked_tx, locked_rx) = std::sync::mpsc::channel();
 5470|       |        let (release_tx, release_rx) = std::sync::mpsc::channel();
 5471|       |        let blocked_clone = Arc::clone(&blocked);
 5472|       |        let handle = std::thread::spawn(move || {
 5473|       |            let _guard = blocked_clone.lock().expect("blocked lock");
 5474|       |            locked_tx.send(()).expect("locked signal");
 5475|       |            release_rx.recv().expect("release signal");
 5476|       |        });
 5477|       |        locked_rx.recv().expect("wait for lock");
 5478|       |        assert!(!current_thread_override_matches(&blocked));
 5479|       |        release_tx.send(()).expect("release thread");
 5480|       |        handle.join().expect("join blocked thread");
 5481|       |    }
 5482|       |

 5485|       |    fn test_take_matching_init_error_stage_handles_poisoned_and_would_block() {
 5486|       |        let poisoned = std::sync::Mutex::new(Some((std::thread::current().id(), 7usize)));
 5487|       |        let _ = std::panic::catch_unwind(std::panic::AssertUnwindSafe(|| {
 5488|       |            let _guard = poisoned.lock().expect("poison source lock");
 5489|       |            panic!("poison init error mutex");
 5490|       |        }));
 5491|       |        assert!(take_matching_init_error_stage(&poisoned, 7));
 5492|       |        poisoned.clear_poison();
 5493|       |
 5494|       |        let blocked = Arc::new(std::sync::Mutex::new(Some((
 5495|       |            std::thread::current().id(),
 5496|       |            9usize,
 5497|       |        ))));
 5498|       |        let (locked_tx, locked_rx) = std::sync::mpsc::channel();
 5499|       |        let (release_tx, release_rx) = std::sync::mpsc::channel();
 5500|       |        let blocked_clone = Arc::clone(&blocked);
 5501|       |        let handle = std::thread::spawn(move || {
 5502|       |            let _guard = blocked_clone.lock().expect("blocked lock");
 5503|       |            locked_tx.send(()).expect("locked signal");
 5504|       |            release_rx.recv().expect("release signal");
 5505|       |        });
 5506|       |        locked_rx.recv().expect("wait for lock");
 5507|       |        assert!(!take_matching_init_error_stage(&blocked, 9));

 5630|       |    fn test_lru_cache_evict_oldest_branches() {
 5631|       |        let mut cache = LruCache::new(1);
 5632|       |        cache.insert("alpha".to_string(), 1);
 5633|       |        assert!(cache.evict_oldest());
 5634|       |        cache.order.clear();
 5635|       |        assert!(!cache.evict_oldest());
 5636|       |    }
 5637|       |
 5638|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5639|       |    #[test]
 5640|       |    fn test_lru_cache_insert_and_evict_type_variants() {
 5641|       |        let mut id_cache = LruCache::new(1);
 5642|       |        id_cache.insert(1u64, "one".to_string());
 5643|       |        id_cache.insert(2u64, "two".to_string());
 5644|       |        id_cache.entries.insert(3u64, "three".to_string());
 5645|       |        id_cache.order.clear();
 5646|       |        id_cache.insert(4u64, "four".to_string());
 5647|       |        assert!(id_cache.evict_oldest());
 5648|       |        id_cache.order.clear();
 5649|       |        assert!(!id_cache.evict_oldest());
 5650|       |
 5651|       |        let mut string_cache = LruCache::new(1);
 5652|       |        string_cache.insert("a".to_string(), "one".to_string());
 5653|       |        string_cache.insert("b".to_string(), "two".to_string());
 5654|       |        string_cache
 5655|       |            .entries
 5656|       |            .insert("c".to_string(), "three".to_string());
 5657|       |        string_cache.order.clear();
 5658|       |        string_cache.insert("d".to_string(), "four".to_string());
 5659|       |        assert!(string_cache.evict_oldest());
 5660|       |        string_cache.order.clear();
 5661|       |        assert!(!string_cache.evict_oldest());
 5662|       |
 5663|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5664|       |        let tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5665|       |            "mermaid_evict_variant",
 5666|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5667|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5668|       |        );
 5669|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5670|       |            texture: tex,
 5671|       |            size: [1, 1],
 5672|       |        };
 5673|       |        let mut texture_cache = LruCache::new(1);
 5674|       |        texture_cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5675|       |        texture_cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5676|       |        texture_cache.entries.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5677|       |        texture_cache.order.clear();
 5678|       |        texture_cache.insert("d".to_string(), entry);
 5679|       |        assert!(texture_cache.evict_oldest());
 5680|       |        texture_cache.order.clear();
 5681|       |        assert!(!texture_cache.evict_oldest());
 5682|       |    }

 5684|       |    #[test]
 5685|       |    fn test_lru_cache_string_string_branches() {
 5686|       |        let mut cache = LruCache::new(1);
 5687|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"missing".to_string()).is_none());
 5688|       |
 5689|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), "one".to_string());
 5690|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), "uno".to_string());
 5691|       |        assert_eq!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()), Some("uno".to_string()));
 5692|       |
 5693|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), "two".to_string());
 5694|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_none());
 5695|       |
 5696|       |        cache.entries.insert("c".to_string(), "three".to_string());
 5697|       |        cache.order.clear();
 5698|       |        cache.insert("d".to_string(), "four".to_string());
 5699|       |        assert!(cache.len() >= 1);
 5700|       |    }

 5703|       |    #[test]
 5704|       |    fn test_lru_cache_mermaid_type_variants() {
 5705|       |        let mut string_cache = LruCache::new(2);
 5706|       |        string_cache.insert(1u64, "one".to_string());
 5707|       |        string_cache.insert(2u64, "two".to_string());
 5708|       |        assert_eq!(string_cache.get(&1), Some("one".to_string()));
 5709|       |        assert!(string_cache.get(&3).is_none());
 5710|       |        string_cache.insert(1u64, "uno".to_string());
 5711|       |        string_cache.insert(3u64, "three".to_string());
 5712|       |
 5713|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5714|       |        let tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5715|       |            "mermaid_cache_test",
 5716|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5717|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5718|       |        );
 5719|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5720|       |            texture: tex,
 5721|       |            size: [1, 1],
 5722|       |        };
 5723|       |        let mut texture_cache = LruCache::new(1);
 5724|       |        assert!(texture_cache.get(&"missing".to_string()).is_none());
 5725|       |        texture_cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5726|       |        assert!(texture_cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_some());
 5727|       |        texture_cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5728|       |        texture_cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5729|       |        texture_cache.entries.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5730|       |        texture_cache.order.clear();
 5731|       |        texture_cache.insert("d".to_string(), entry);
 5732|       |    }
 5733|       |
 5734|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5735|       |    #[test]
 5736|       |    fn test_svg_cache_size_based_eviction() {
 5737|       |        // Test that SvgCache evicts based on size, not just count
 5738|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(10, 100); // 10 entries max, 100 bytes max
 5739|       |
 5740|       |        // Insert small entries that fit within size limit
 5741|       |        cache.insert(1, "abc".to_string()); // 3 bytes
 5742|       |        cache.insert(2, "def".to_string()); // 3 bytes
 5743|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5744|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 6);
 5745|       |
 5746|       |        // Insert large entry that exceeds size limit - should evict oldest
 5747|       |        let large_svg = "x".repeat(95); // 95 bytes
 5748|       |        cache.insert(3, large_svg);
 5749|       |        // current=6, adding 95 -> 101 > 100, so evict entry 1 (oldest)
 5750|       |        // After evicting entry 1: current=3, 3+95=98 <= 100, so stop evicting
 5751|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none()); // Entry 1 was evicted
 5752|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_some()); // Entry 2 still present (3+95=98 <= 100)
 5753|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_some());
 5754|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 98); // 3 (entry 2) + 95 (entry 3)
 5755|       |
 5756|       |        // Now insert another large entry to force more eviction
 5757|       |        let another_large = "y".repeat(50); // 50 bytes
 5758|       |        cache.insert(4, another_large);
 5759|       |        // current=98, adding 50 -> 148 > 100, evict entry 2 (now oldest)
 5760|       |        // After evicting 2: current=95, 95+50=145 > 100, evict entry 3
 5761|       |        // After evicting 3: current=0, 0+50=50 <= 100, insert
 5762|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_none());
 5763|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_none());
 5764|       |        assert!(cache.get(&4).is_some());
 5765|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 50);
 5766|       |    }
 5767|       |
 5768|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5769|       |    #[test]
 5770|       |    fn test_svg_cache_count_based_eviction() {
 5771|       |        // Test that SvgCache still respects entry count limit
 5772|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(2, 1000); // 2 entries max, 1000 bytes max
 5773|       |
 5774|       |        cache.insert(1, "a".to_string());
 5775|       |        cache.insert(2, "b".to_string());
 5776|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5777|       |
 5778|       |        // Insert third entry - should evict oldest (entry 1)
 5779|       |        cache.insert(3, "c".to_string());
 5780|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 5781|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_some());
 5782|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_some());
 5783|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5784|       |    }

 5787|       |    #[test]
 5788|       |    fn test_svg_cache_update_existing_key() {
 5789|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(10, 1000);
 5790|       |
 5791|       |        cache.insert(1, "short".to_string()); // 5 bytes
 5792|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 5);
 5793|       |
 5794|       |        // Update with longer value
 5795|       |        cache.insert(1, "much longer string".to_string()); // 18 bytes
 5796|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 1);
 5797|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 18);
 5798|       |
 5799|       |        // Update with shorter value
 5800|       |        cache.insert(1, "x".to_string()); // 1 byte
 5801|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 1);
 5802|       |    }

 5804|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5805|       |    #[test]
 5806|       |    fn test_svg_cache_touch_on_get() {
 5807|       |        let mut cache = SvgCache::new(2, 1000);
 5808|       |
 5809|       |        cache.insert(1, "a".to_string());
 5810|       |        cache.insert(2, "b".to_string());
 5811|       |
 5812|       |        // Access entry 1 to move it to back of LRU order
 5813|       |        let _ = cache.get(&1);
 5814|       |
 5815|       |        // Insert third entry - should evict entry 2 (now oldest)
 5816|       |        cache.insert(3, "c".to_string());
 5817|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_some()); // Entry 1 survived because it was accessed
 5818|       |        assert!(cache.get(&2).is_none()); // Entry 2 was evicted
 5819|       |        assert!(cache.get(&3).is_some());
 5820|       |    }

 5824|       |    fn test_svg_cache_evict_oldest_missing_entry_branch() {

 5826|       |        cache.insert(1, "a".to_string());
 5827|       |        cache.order.clear();
 5828|       |        cache.order.push_back(99);
 5829|       |
 5830|       |        cache.evict_oldest();
 5831|       |
 5832|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_some());
 5833|       |    }

 5835|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5836|       |    #[test]
 5837|       |    fn test_texture_cache_size_based_eviction() {
 5838|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5839|       |        // Create a small texture that's 10x10 = 100 pixels = 400 bytes
 5840|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5841|       |            "small",
 5842|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::WHITE),
 5843|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5844|       |        );
 5845|       |        // Create textures and set max_bytes to 1000 (enough for 2 textures but not 3)
 5846|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(10, 1000);
 5847|       |
 5848|       |        let entry1 = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5849|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5850|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5851|       |        };
 5852|       |        let entry2 = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5853|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5854|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5855|       |        };
 5856|       |        let entry3 = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5857|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5858|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5859|       |        };
 5860|       |
 5861|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry1);
 5862|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 1);
 5863|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 400);
 5864|       |
 5865|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry2);
 5866|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5867|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 800);
 5868|       |
 5869|       |        // This should evict "a" because total would exceed 1000 bytes
 5870|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry3);
 5871|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5872|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 800);
 5873|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_none()); // Evicted
 5874|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_some());
 5875|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_some());
 5876|       |    }
 5877|       |
 5878|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5879|       |    #[test]
 5880|       |    fn test_texture_cache_count_based_eviction() {
 5881|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5882|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5883|       |            "count_test",
 5884|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5885|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5886|       |        );
 5887|       |        // Capacity 2, large byte limit (count-based eviction should trigger first)
 5888|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(2, 1024 * 1024);
 5889|       |
 5890|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5891|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5892|       |            size: [1, 1], // 4 bytes
 5893|       |        };
 5894|       |
 5895|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5896|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5897|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5898|       |
 5899|       |        // This should evict "a" because capacity is 2
 5900|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5901|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 5902|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_none());
 5903|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_some());
 5904|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_some());
 5905|       |    }

 5907|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5908|       |    #[test]
 5909|       |    fn test_texture_cache_update_existing_key() {
 5910|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5911|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5912|       |            "update_test",
 5913|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([5, 5], Color32::WHITE),
 5914|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5915|       |        );
 5916|       |        let large_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5917|       |            "update_test_large",
 5918|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::WHITE),
 5919|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5920|       |        );
 5921|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(10, 1024 * 1024);
 5922|       |
 5923|       |        let small_entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5924|       |            texture: small_tex,
 5925|       |            size: [5, 5], // 100 bytes
 5926|       |        };
 5927|       |        let large_entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5928|       |            texture: large_tex,
 5929|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 5930|       |        };
 5931|       |
 5932|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), small_entry);
 5933|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 100);
 5934|       |
 5935|       |        // Update same key with larger entry
 5936|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), large_entry);
 5937|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 1);
 5938|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 400);
 5939|       |    }
 5940|       |
 5941|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5942|       |    #[test]
 5943|       |    fn test_texture_cache_touch_on_get() {
 5944|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5945|       |        let small_tex = ctx.load_texture(
 5946|       |            "touch_test",
 5947|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5948|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5949|       |        );
 5950|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(2, 1024 * 1024);
 5951|       |
 5952|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 5953|       |            texture: small_tex.clone(),
 5954|       |            size: [1, 1],
 5955|       |        };
 5956|       |
 5957|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5958|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5959|       |
 5960|       |        // Touch "a" by getting it
 5961|       |        let _ = cache.get(&"a".to_string());
 5962|       |
 5963|       |        // Now "c" should evict "b" (not "a") because "a" was touched more recently
 5964|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 5965|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_some());
 5966|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_none()); // Evicted
 5967|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_some());
 5968|       |    }

 5971|       |    #[test]
 5972|       |    fn test_texture_cache_evict_oldest_missing_entry_branch() {
 5973|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5974|       |        let texture = ctx.load_texture(
 5975|       |            "missing-entry",
 5976|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 5977|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 5978|       |        );
 5979|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(2, 1024 * 1024);
 5980|       |        cache.insert(
 5981|       |            "a".to_string(),
 5982|       |            MermaidTextureEntry {
 5983|       |                texture,
 5984|       |                size: [1, 1],
 5985|       |            },
 5986|       |        );
 5987|       |        cache.order.clear();
 5988|       |        cache.order.push_back("missing".to_string());
 5989|       |
 5990|       |        cache.evict_oldest();
 5991|       |
 5992|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_some());
 5993|       |    }

 5995|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 5996|       |    #[test]
 5997|       |    fn test_texture_cache_clear() {
 5998|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 5999|       |        let tex = ctx.load_texture(
 6000|       |            "clear_test",
 6001|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([10, 10], Color32::WHITE),
 6002|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 6003|       |        );
 6004|       |        let mut cache = TextureCache::new(10, 1024 * 1024);
 6005|       |
 6006|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 6007|       |            texture: tex.clone(),
 6008|       |            size: [10, 10], // 400 bytes
 6009|       |        };
 6010|       |
 6011|       |        // Insert multiple entries
 6012|       |        cache.insert("a".to_string(), entry.clone());
 6013|       |        cache.insert("b".to_string(), entry.clone());
 6014|       |        cache.insert("c".to_string(), entry.clone());
 6015|       |
 6016|       |        // Verify cache has entries
 6017|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 3);
 6018|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 1200); // 3 * 400 bytes
 6019|       |
 6020|       |        // Clear the cache
 6021|       |        cache.clear();
 6022|       |
 6023|       |        // Verify cache is now empty
 6024|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 0);
 6025|       |        assert_eq!(cache.current_bytes(), 0);
 6026|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"a".to_string()).is_none());
 6027|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"b".to_string()).is_none());
 6028|       |        assert!(cache.get(&"c".to_string()).is_none());
 6029|       |    }

 6031|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6032|       |    #[test]
 6033|       |    fn test_mermaid_renderer_cache_branches() {
 6034|       |        let renderer = MermaidRenderer::new();
 6035|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 6036|       |        let tex = ctx.load_texture(
 6037|       |            "mermaid_renderer_cache",
 6038|       |            egui::ColorImage::new([1, 1], Color32::WHITE),
 6039|       |            egui::TextureOptions::LINEAR,
 6040|       |        );
 6041|       |        let entry = MermaidTextureEntry {
 6042|       |            texture: tex,
 6043|       |            size: [1, 1],
 6044|       |        };
 6045|       |
 6046|       |        {
 6047|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut();
 6048|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"miss".to_string()).is_none());
 6049|       |            cache.insert("hit".to_string(), entry.clone());
 6050|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"hit".to_string()).is_some());
 6051|       |            cache.entries.insert("stale".to_string(), entry.clone());
 6052|       |            cache.order.clear();
 6053|       |            cache.insert("fresh".to_string(), entry.clone());
 6054|       |        }
 6055|       |
 6056|       |        {
 6057|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow_mut();
 6058|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 6059|       |            cache.insert(1, "one".to_string());
 6060|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_some());
 6061|       |            cache.entries.insert(2, "two".to_string());
 6062|       |            cache.order.clear();
 6063|       |            cache.insert(3, "three".to_string());
 6064|       |        }
 6065|       |
 6066|       |        {
 6067|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_errors.borrow_mut();
 6068|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 6069|       |            cache.insert(1, "err".to_string());
 6070|       |            assert!(cache.get(&1).is_some());
 6071|       |            cache.entries.insert(2, "err2".to_string());
 6072|       |            cache.order.clear();
 6073|       |            cache.insert(3, "err3".to_string());
 6074|       |        }
 6075|       |
 6076|       |        {
 6077|       |            let mut cache = renderer.mermaid_texture_errors.borrow_mut();
 6078|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"miss".to_string()).is_none());
 6079|       |            cache.insert("hit".to_string(), "err".to_string());
 6080|       |            assert!(cache.get(&"hit".to_string()).is_some());
 6081|       |            cache
 6082|       |                .entries
 6083|       |                .insert("stale".to_string(), "err2".to_string());
 6084|       |            cache.order.clear();
 6085|       |            cache.insert("fresh".to_string(), "err3".to_string());
 6086|       |        }
 6087|       |    }
 6088|       |
 6089|       |    #[test]
 6090|       |    fn test_mermaid_texture_key_changes_with_scale_and_bg() {
 6091|       |        let svg_key = 42;
 6092|       |        let width_bucket = 320;
 6093|       |        let scale_a = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0);
 6094|       |        let scale_b = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.2);
 6095|       |        let bg_a = [255, 0, 0, 255];
 6096|       |        let bg_b = [0, 0, 0, 255];
 6097|       |
 6098|       |        let key_a = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_a, bg_a);
 6099|       |        let key_b = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_b, bg_a);
 6100|       |        let key_c = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_a, bg_b);
 6101|       |
 6102|       |        assert_ne!(key_a, key_b);
 6103|       |        assert_ne!(key_a, key_c);
 6104|       |    }
 6105|       |
 6106|       |    #[test]
 6107|       |    fn test_mermaid_width_bucket_rounds_up() {
 6108|       |        let step = MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_WIDTH_BUCKET_STEP;
 6109|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(1.0), step);
 6110|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(step as f32 + 0.1), step * 2);
 6111|       |    }

 6128|       |    #[test]
 6129|       |    fn test_should_allow_html_labels_always_false_for_usvg() {
 6130|       |        // HTML labels are disabled because usvg cannot render foreignObject.
 6131|       |        // All inputs should return false to force SVG text elements.
 6132|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6133|       |            "graph TD; A[\"<i>Voice</i>\"]"
 6134|       |        ));
 6135|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6136|       |            "graph TD; A[\"<b>Bold</b>\"]"
 6137|       |        ));
 6138|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6139|       |            "graph TD; A[\"<script>bad</script>\"]"
 6140|       |        ));
 6141|       |        assert!(!MermaidRenderer::should_allow_html_labels(
 6142|       |            "graph TD; A[\"plain text\"]"
 6143|       |        ));
 6144|       |    }

 6169|       |            (MermaidTheme::Dark, "dark"),
 6170|       |            (MermaidTheme::Default, "default"),

 6180|       |            );

 6217|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6218|       |    #[test]
 6219|       |    fn test_mermaid_quickjs_render_smoke() {
 6220|       |        let mut worker = test_worker();
 6221|       |
 6222|       |        let flow = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 6223|       |        let seq = "sequenceDiagram\nAlice->>Bob: Hello\nBob-->>Alice: Hi";
 6224|       |        let class = "classDiagram\nClass01 <|-- Class02\nClass01 : +int id\nClass02 : +String name";
 6225|       |        let er = "erDiagram\nCUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places\nORDER ||--|{ LINE_ITEM : contains\nCUSTOMER {\n  int id\n  string name\n}\nORDER {\n  int id\n  date created\n}\nLINE_ITEM {\n  int id\n  int qty\n}\n";
 6226|       |        let gantt = "gantt\ntitle Sample Gantt\ndateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD\nsection A\nTask 1 :a1, 2024-01-01, 5d\nTask 2 :after a1, 3d\nsection B\nTask 3 :b1, 2024-01-06, 4d\n";
 6227|       |        let viewport_width = 1200;
 6228|       |        let viewport_height = 900;
 6229|       |
 6230|       |        let flow_svg = worker
 6231|       |            .render_svg(
 6232|       |                hash_str(flow),
 6233|       |                flow,
 6234|       |                viewport_width,
 6235|       |                viewport_height,
 6236|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6237|       |            )
 6238|       |            .expect("flowchart render");
 6239|       |        let seq_svg = worker
 6240|       |            .render_svg(
 6241|       |                hash_str(seq),
 6242|       |                seq,
 6243|       |                viewport_width,
 6244|       |                viewport_height,
 6245|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6246|       |            )
 6247|       |            .expect("sequence render");
 6248|       |        let class_svg = worker
 6249|       |            .render_svg(
 6250|       |                hash_str(class),
 6251|       |                class,
 6252|       |                viewport_width,
 6253|       |                viewport_height,
 6254|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6255|       |            )
 6256|       |            .expect("class render");
 6257|       |        let er_svg = worker
 6258|       |            .render_svg(
 6259|       |                hash_str(er),
 6260|       |                er,
 6261|       |                viewport_width,
 6262|       |                viewport_height,
 6263|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6264|       |            )
 6265|       |            .expect("er render");
 6266|       |        let gantt_svg = worker
 6267|       |            .render_svg(
 6268|       |                hash_str(gantt),
 6269|       |                gantt,
 6270|       |                viewport_width,
 6271|       |                viewport_height,
 6272|       |                MermaidTheme::Default,
 6273|       |            )
 6274|       |            .expect("gantt render");
 6275|       |
 6276|       |        assert!(flow_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6277|       |        assert!(seq_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6278|       |        assert!(class_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6279|       |        assert!(er_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6280|       |        assert!(gantt_svg.contains("<svg"));
 6281|       |
 6282|       |        let width_bucket = MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(600.0);
 6283|       |        let scale_bucket = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0);
 6284|       |        let (rgba, w, h) = worker
 6285|       |            .rasterize_svg(
 6286|       |                &flow_svg,
 6287|       |                width_bucket,
 6288|       |                scale_bucket,
 6289|       |                MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6290|       |            )
 6291|       |            .expect("rasterize svg");
 6292|       |        assert!(!rgba.is_empty());
 6293|       |        assert_eq!(rgba.len(), (w as usize) * (h as usize) * 4);
 6294|       |        assert!(w > 0);
 6295|       |        assert!(h > 0);
 6296|       |        assert!(w <= MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_MAX_RENDER_SIDE);
 6297|       |        assert!(h <= MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_MAX_RENDER_SIDE);
 6298|       |    }

 6315|       |                viewport_width,
 6316|       |                viewport_height,

 6318|       |            )
 6319|       |            .expect("diagram with html tags render");

 6322|       |        // Text should be in SVG text elements (htmlLabels disabled for usvg compatibility)

 6396|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6397|       |    #[test]
 6398|       |    fn test_mermaid_js_empty_override_matches_thread() {
 6399|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6400|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6401|       |        {
 6402|       |            let _guard = MermaidJsEmptyGuard::set(true);
 6403|       |            assert!(mermaid_js_empty());
 6404|       |        }
 6405|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6406|       |    }
 6407|       |
 6408|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6409|       |    #[test]
 6410|       |    fn test_mermaid_js_empty_override_mismatch_thread() {
 6411|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6412|       |        let handle = std::thread::spawn(|| set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(true));
 6413|       |        let _ = handle.join();
 6414|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6415|       |        set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(false);
 6416|       |    }
 6417|       |
 6418|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6419|       |    #[test]
 6420|       |    fn test_mermaid_js_empty_override_false_clears() {
 6421|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6422|       |        set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(true);
 6423|       |        let previous = set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(false);
 6424|       |        assert!(previous.is_some());
 6425|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6426|       |    }

 6429|       |    #[test]
 6430|       |    fn test_mermaid_js_empty_override_lock_busy() {
 6431|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 6432|       |        let guard = MERMAID_JS_EMPTY_OVERRIDE.try_lock().expect("override lock");
 6433|       |        assert_eq!(mermaid_js_empty(), MERMAID_JS_EMPTY);
 6434|       |        drop(guard);
 6435|       |    }

 6465|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6466|       |    #[test]
 6467|       |    fn test_map_init_result_variants() {
 6468|       |        // Tests the inlined init-error mapping pattern used in MermaidWorker::new
 6469|       |        let ok: Result<(), String> = Ok(());
 6470|       |        assert!(ok
 6471|       |            .map_err(|err| format!("Mermaid init error: {}", err))
 6472|       |            .is_ok());
 6473|       |        let err: Result<(), String> = Err("oops".to_string());
 6474|       |        let msg = err
 6475|       |            .map_err(|err| format!("Mermaid init error: {}", err))
 6476|       |            .unwrap_err();
 6477|       |        assert!(msg.contains("Mermaid init error: oops"));
 6478|       |    }

 6482|       |    fn test_format_render_result_variants() {
 6483|       |        let ok = MermaidWorker::format_render_result(Ok("<svg></svg>".to_string()), 10, 5)
 6484|       |            .expect("ok result");
 6485|       |        assert!(ok.contains("<svg"));
 6486|       |
 6487|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::format_render_result(Err("boom".to_string()), 10, 5).unwrap_err();
 6488|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid render error: boom"));
 6489|       |
 6490|       |        let timeout =
 6491|       |            MermaidWorker::format_render_result(Err("late".to_string()), 10, 20).unwrap_err();

 6493|       |    }

 6567|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6568|       |    #[test]
 6569|       |    fn test_rasterize_svg_oversize_bbox_translates() {
 6570|       |        let worker = test_worker();
 6571|       |        let svg = r#"<svg width="100" height="50" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="-60" y="0" width="200" height="50" fill="red"/></svg>"#;
 6572|       |        let (_data, w, h) = worker
 6573|       |            .rasterize_svg(
 6574|       |                svg,
 6575|       |                0,
 6576|       |                MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 6577|       |                MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6578|       |            )
 6579|       |            .expect("rasterize svg");
 6580|       |        assert!(w > 100);
 6581|       |        assert!(h >= 50);
 6582|       |    }

 6672|       |    #[test]
 6673|       |    fn test_bbox_validation_helpers() {
 6674|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, 10.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6675|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(0.0, 10.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6676|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6677|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(f32::NAN, 10.0, 0.0, 0.0));
 6678|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, f32::INFINITY, 0.0, 0.0));
 6679|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(10.0, 10.0, f32::NAN, 0.0));
 6680|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::bbox_is_valid(
 6681|       |            10.0,
 6682|       |            10.0,
 6683|       |            0.0,
 6684|       |            f32::INFINITY
 6685|       |        ));
 6686|       |    }

 6692|       |            true, true, 1.0, 1.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6693|       |        ));
 6694|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6695|       |            true, false, 50.0, 50.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6696|       |        ));

 6698|       |            false, true, 20.0, 5.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6699|       |        ));
 6700|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6701|       |            false, true, 11.0, 11.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6702|       |        ));
 6703|       |        assert!(!MermaidWorker::should_resize_bbox(
 6704|       |            false, false, 50.0, 50.0, 10.0, 10.0
 6705|       |        ));
 6706|       |    }

 6713|       |        let job = MermaidRequest {
 6714|       |            svg_key: 2,
 6715|       |            texture_key: "bad-svg".to_string(),
 6716|       |            code: Some("graph TD; A-->B;".to_string()),
 6717|       |            svg: Some("not svg".to_string()),
 6718|       |            width_bucket: 100,
 6719|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 6720|       |            viewport_width: 100,
 6721|       |            viewport_height: 100,
 6722|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6723|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 6724|       |        };
 6725|       |
 6726|       |        let result = worker.process_job(job);
 6727|       |        assert!(result.svg.is_some());

 6810|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6811|       |    #[test]
 6812|       |    fn test_rasterize_svg_applies_background_fill() {
 6813|       |        let worker = test_worker();
 6814|       |
 6815|       |        let svg = r#"<svg width="4" height="4" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"></svg>"#;
 6816|       |        let bg = [10, 20, 30, 200];
 6817|       |        let (data, w, h) = worker
 6818|       |            .rasterize_svg(svg, 0, MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0), bg)
 6819|       |            .expect("rasterize svg");
 6820|       |        assert_eq!((w, h), (4, 4));
 6821|       |        assert_eq!(data.len(), (w as usize) * (h as usize) * 4);
 6822|       |        let alpha = 200.0_f32 / 255.0;
 6823|       |        let expected_r = (10.0_f32 * alpha).round() as u8;
 6824|       |        let expected_g = (20.0_f32 * alpha).round() as u8;
 6825|       |        let expected_b = (30.0_f32 * alpha).round() as u8;
 6826|       |        assert_eq!(data[0], expected_r);
 6827|       |        assert_eq!(data[1], expected_g);
 6828|       |        assert_eq!(data[2], expected_b);
 6829|       |        assert_eq!(data[3], 200);
 6830|       |    }

 6832|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6833|       |    #[test]
 6834|       |    fn test_process_job_applies_svg_fixups() {
 6835|       |        let mut worker = test_worker();
 6836|       |
 6837|       |        let svg = r#"<svg width="120" height="120" viewBox="0 0 120 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
 6838|       |<switch>
 6839|       |  <foreignObject><div>Plan</div></foreignObject>
 6840|       |  <text class="journey-section section-type-0" x="10">Plan</text>
 6841|       |</switch>
 6842|       |<g id="state-root_end-0">
 6843|       |  <circle class="state-end" r="5" width="10" height="10"></circle>
 6844|       |  <circle class="state-start" r="7" width="14" height="14"></circle>
 6845|       |</g>
 6846|       |<rect class="er attributeBoxOdd"></rect>
 6847|       |</svg>"#;
 6848|       |
 6849|       |        let job = MermaidRequest {
 6850|       |            svg_key: 4,
 6851|       |            texture_key: "fixups".to_string(),
 6852|       |            code: None,
 6853|       |            svg: Some(svg.to_string()),
 6854|       |            width_bucket: 0,
 6855|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 6856|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 6857|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 6858|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 6859|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 6860|       |        };
 6861|       |
 6862|       |        let result = worker.process_job(job);
 6863|       |        let rendered = result.svg.expect("svg output");
 6864|       |        assert!(!rendered.contains("<switch"));
 6865|       |        assert!(rendered.contains("fill:"));
 6866|       |        assert!(rendered.contains("end-state-inner"));
 6867|       |        assert!(rendered.contains("attributeBoxOdd"));
 6868|       |    }

 6870|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6871|       |    #[test]
 6872|       |    fn test_poll_mermaid_results_handles_variants() {
 6873|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 6874|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 6875|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 6876|       |
 6877|       |        renderer
 6878|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6879|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6880|       |            .insert("k1".to_string());
 6881|       |        result_tx
 6882|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6883|       |                svg_key: 1,
 6884|       |                texture_key: "k1".to_string(),
 6885|       |                svg: Some("<svg width=\"1\" height=\"1\"></svg>".to_string()),
 6886|       |                rgba: None,
 6887|       |                size: None,
 6888|       |                error: None,
 6889|       |            })
 6890|       |            .expect("send svg");
 6891|       |        assert!(renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx));
 6892|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow_mut().get(&1).is_some());
 6893|       |
 6894|       |        renderer
 6895|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6896|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6897|       |            .insert("k2".to_string());
 6898|       |        result_tx
 6899|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6900|       |                svg_key: 2,
 6901|       |                texture_key: "k2".to_string(),
 6902|       |                svg: None,
 6903|       |                rgba: Some(vec![0, 0, 0, 0]),
 6904|       |                size: None,
 6905|       |                error: None,
 6906|       |            })
 6907|       |            .expect("send rgba missing size");
 6908|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6909|       |        assert!(renderer
 6910|       |            .mermaid_texture_errors
 6911|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6912|       |            .get(&"k2".to_string())
 6913|       |            .is_some());
 6914|       |
 6915|       |        renderer
 6916|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6917|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6918|       |            .insert("k3".to_string());
 6919|       |        result_tx
 6920|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6921|       |                svg_key: 3,
 6922|       |                texture_key: "k3".to_string(),
 6923|       |                svg: None,
 6924|       |                rgba: None,
 6925|       |                size: None,
 6926|       |                error: Some("boom".to_string()),
 6927|       |            })
 6928|       |            .expect("send error");
 6929|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6930|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_errors.borrow_mut().get(&3).is_some());
 6931|       |
 6932|       |        renderer
 6933|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6934|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6935|       |            .insert("k4".to_string());
 6936|       |        result_tx
 6937|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6938|       |                svg_key: 4,
 6939|       |                texture_key: "k4".to_string(),
 6940|       |                svg: Some("<svg width=\"1\" height=\"1\"></svg>".to_string()),
 6941|       |                rgba: None,
 6942|       |                size: None,
 6943|       |                error: Some("oops".to_string()),
 6944|       |            })
 6945|       |            .expect("send texture error");
 6946|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6947|       |        assert!(renderer
 6948|       |            .mermaid_texture_errors
 6949|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6950|       |            .get(&"k4".to_string())
 6951|       |            .is_some());
 6952|       |
 6953|       |        renderer
 6954|       |            .mermaid_pending
 6955|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6956|       |            .insert("k5".to_string());
 6957|       |        result_tx
 6958|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 6959|       |                svg_key: 5,
 6960|       |                texture_key: "k5".to_string(),
 6961|       |                svg: None,
 6962|       |                rgba: Some(vec![255, 255, 255, 255]),
 6963|       |                size: Some((1, 1)),
 6964|       |                error: None,
 6965|       |            })
 6966|       |            .expect("send rgba with size");
 6967|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 6968|       |        assert!(renderer
 6969|       |            .mermaid_textures
 6970|       |            .borrow_mut()
 6971|       |            .get(&"k5".to_string())
 6972|       |            .is_some());
 6973|       |    }
 6974|       |
 6975|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 6976|       |    #[test]
 6977|       |    fn test_format_js_error_variants() {
 6978|       |        let rt = rquickjs::Runtime::new().expect("runtime");
 6979|       |        let ctx = rquickjs::Context::full(&rt).expect("context");
 6980|       |        ctx.with(|ctx| {
 6981|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw new Error('boom')").unwrap_err();
 6982|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6983|       |            assert!(msg.contains("boom"));
 6984|       |
 6985|       |            let err = ctx
 6986|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('match'); e.stack = 'match\\nstack'; throw e;")
 6987|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6988|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6989|       |            assert!(msg.contains("match"));
 6990|       |
 6991|       |            let err = ctx
 6992|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('note'); e.stack = 'stack only'; throw e;")
 6993|       |                .unwrap_err();
 6994|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 6995|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 6996|       |
 6997|       |            let err = ctx
 6998|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('blank'); e.stack = ' '; throw e;")
 6999|       |                .unwrap_err();
 7000|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7001|       |            assert!(msg.contains("blank"));
 7002|       |
 7003|       |            let err = ctx
 7004|       |                .eval::<(), _>("throw ({ stack: 'stack-only-obj' })")
 7005|       |                .unwrap_err();
 7006|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7007|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 7008|       |
 7009|       |            let err = ctx
 7010|       |                .eval::<(), _>("throw ({ message: 'message-only-obj' })")
 7011|       |                .unwrap_err();
 7012|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7013|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 7014|       |
 7015|       |            let err = ctx
 7016|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error(''); e.message = undefined; e.stack = 'stack-only'; throw e;")
 7017|       |                .unwrap_err();
 7018|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7019|       |            assert!(msg.contains("stack-only"));
 7020|       |
 7021|       |            let err = ctx
 7022|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('solo'); delete e.stack; throw e;")
 7023|       |                .unwrap_err();
 7024|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7025|       |            assert!(msg.contains("solo"));
 7026|       |
 7027|       |            let err = ctx
 7028|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('solo2'); e.stack = undefined; throw e;")
 7029|       |                .unwrap_err();
 7030|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7031|       |            assert!(msg.contains("solo2"));
 7032|       |
 7033|       |            let err = ctx
 7034|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error('zap'); e.stack = ''; throw e;")
 7035|       |                .unwrap_err();
 7036|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7037|       |            assert!(msg.contains("zap"));
 7038|       |
 7039|       |            let err = ctx
 7040|       |                .eval::<(), _>("var e = new Error(''); e.message = ''; e.stack = ''; throw e;")
 7041|       |                .unwrap_err();
 7042|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7043|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 7044|       |
 7045|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw 'stringy'").unwrap_err();
 7046|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7047|       |            assert_eq!(msg, "stringy");
 7048|       |
 7049|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw 42").unwrap_err();
 7050|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7051|       |            assert_eq!(msg, "42");
 7052|       |
 7053|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw 3.5").unwrap_err();
 7054|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7055|       |            assert!(msg.contains("3.5"));
 7056|       |
 7057|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw true").unwrap_err();
 7058|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7059|       |            assert_eq!(msg, "true");
 7060|       |
 7061|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, rquickjs::Error::Unknown);
 7062|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 7063|       |
 7064|       |            let err = ctx.eval::<(), _>("throw ({})").unwrap_err();
 7065|       |            let msg = MermaidWorker::format_js_error(&ctx, err);
 7066|       |            assert!(!msg.is_empty());
 7067|       |        });
 7068|       |    }
 7069|       |
 7070|       |    struct EnvGuard {
 7071|       |        key: &'static str,
 7072|       |        original: Option<String>,
 7073|       |    }
 7074|       |
 7075|       |    impl EnvGuard {
 7076|       |        fn set(key: &'static str, value: &str) -> Self {
 7077|       |            let original = std::env::var(key).ok();
 7078|       |            std::env::set_var(key, value);
 7079|       |            Self { key, original }
 7080|       |        }
 7081|       |    }
 7082|       |
 7083|       |    impl Drop for EnvGuard {
 7084|       |        fn drop(&mut self) {
 7085|       |            if let Some(value) = &self.original {
 7086|       |                std::env::set_var(self.key, value);
 7087|       |            } else {
 7088|       |                std::env::remove_var(self.key);
 7089|       |            }
 7090|       |        }
 7091|       |    }
 7092|       |
 7093|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7094|       |    struct MermaidJsEmptyGuard {
 7095|       |        previous: Option<std::thread::ThreadId>,
 7096|       |    }
 7097|       |
 7098|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7099|       |    impl MermaidJsEmptyGuard {
 7100|       |        fn set(value: bool) -> Self {
 7101|       |            let previous = set_mermaid_js_empty_for_test(value);
 7102|       |            Self { previous }
 7103|       |        }
 7104|       |    }
 7105|       |
 7106|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7107|       |    impl Drop for MermaidJsEmptyGuard {
 7108|       |        fn drop(&mut self) {
 7109|       |            let mut guard = MERMAID_JS_EMPTY_OVERRIDE
 7110|       |                .lock()
 7111|       |                .expect("mermaid js override lock");
 7112|       |            *guard = self.previous;
 7113|       |        }
 7114|       |    }
 7115|       |
 7116|       |    #[test]
 7117|       |    fn test_parse_hex_color() {
 7118|       |        assert_eq!(
 7119|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("#ff00ff"),
 7120|       |            Some([255, 0, 255, 255])
 7121|       |        );
 7122|       |        assert_eq!(
 7123|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("11223344"),
 7124|       |            Some([17, 34, 51, 68])
 7125|       |        );
 7126|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("bad").is_none());
 7127|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("GG0000").is_none());
 7128|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("00GG00").is_none());
 7129|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("0000GG").is_none());
 7130|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("GG000000").is_none());
 7131|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("00GG0000").is_none());
 7132|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("0000GG00").is_none());
 7133|       |        assert!(MermaidRenderer::parse_hex_color("000000GG").is_none());
 7134|       |    }

 7136|       |    #[test]
 7137|       |    fn test_env_guard_restores_original_value() {
 7138|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 7139|       |        std::env::set_var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV", "before");
 7140|       |        {
 7141|       |            let _guard = EnvGuard::set("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV", "after");
 7142|       |            assert_eq!(
 7143|       |                std::env::var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV").ok().as_deref(),
 7144|       |                Some("after")
 7145|       |            );
 7146|       |        }
 7147|       |        assert_eq!(
 7148|       |            std::env::var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV").ok().as_deref(),
 7149|       |            Some("before")
 7150|       |        );
 7151|       |        std::env::remove_var("MDMDVIEW_TEST_GUARD_ENV");
 7152|       |    }

 7155|       |    fn test_mermaid_bg_key_and_scale_bucket() {
 7156|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::mermaid_bg_key([1, 2, 3, 4]), "01020304");
 7157|       |        assert_eq!(
 7158|       |            MermaidRenderer::mermaid_bg_key([255, 255, 255, 255]),
 7159|       |            "ffffffff"
 7160|       |        );
 7161|       |
 7162|       |        let factor = MermaidRenderer::MERMAID_SCALE_BUCKET_FACTOR;
 7163|       |        assert_eq!(
 7164|       |            MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(0.1),
 7165|       |            (0.5 * factor).round() as u32
 7166|       |        );
 7167|       |        assert_eq!(
 7168|       |            MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(10.0),
 7169|       |            (4.0 * factor).round() as u32
 7170|       |        );
 7171|       |    }

 7275|       |    #[test]
 7276|       |    fn test_render_block_uses_cached_texture_scales() {
 7277|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7278|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 7279|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7280|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 160.0);
 7281|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7282|       |        let code = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 7283|       |        let mut rendered_large = false;
 7284|       |        let mut rendered_small = false;
 7285|       |
 7286|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7287|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7288|       |                let image = egui::ColorImage::new([2, 2], Color32::WHITE);
 7289|       |                let texture =
 7290|       |                    ui.ctx()
 7291|       |                        .load_texture("mermaid-test", image, egui::TextureOptions::default());
 7292|       |                let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 7293|       |                let make_key = |ui: &egui::Ui| {
 7294|       |                    let width_bucket = MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(ui.available_width());
 7295|       |                    let scale_bucket = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0);
 7296|       |                    let bg = theme.bg_fill();
 7297|       |                    MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, width_bucket, scale_bucket, bg)
 7298|       |                };
 7299|       |
 7300|       |                let texture_key = make_key(ui);
 7301|       |                renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut().insert(
 7302|       |                    texture_key.clone(),
 7303|       |                    MermaidTextureEntry {
 7304|       |                        texture: texture.clone(),
 7305|       |                        size: [400, 200],
 7306|       |                    },
 7307|       |                );
 7308|       |                rendered_large = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7309|       |
 7310|       |                let texture_key = make_key(ui);
 7311|       |                renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut().insert(
 7312|       |                    texture_key,
 7313|       |                    MermaidTextureEntry {
 7314|       |                        texture,
 7315|       |                        size: [20, 10],
 7316|       |                    },
 7317|       |                );
 7318|       |                rendered_small = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7319|       |            });
 7320|       |        });
 7321|       |
 7322|       |        assert!(rendered_large);
 7323|       |        assert!(rendered_small);
 7324|       |    }

 7350|       |    #[test]
 7351|       |    fn test_render_block_queue_full_sets_waiting() {
 7352|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 7353|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 7354|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 7355|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx.clone()), result_rx);
 7356|       |        let request = MermaidRequest {
 7357|       |            svg_key: 1,
 7358|       |            texture_key: "full".to_string(),
 7359|       |            code: Some("graph TD; A-->B;".to_string()),
 7360|       |            svg: None,
 7361|       |            width_bucket: 32,
 7362|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 7363|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 7364|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 7365|       |            bg: theme.bg_fill(),
 7366|       |            theme,
 7367|       |        };
 7368|       |        job_tx.send(request).expect("fill queue");
 7369|       |
 7370|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7371|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 160.0);
 7372|       |        let mut rendered = false;
 7373|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7374|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7375|       |                rendered = renderer.render_block(ui, "graph TD; A-->B;", 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7376|       |            });
 7377|       |        });
 7378|       |        assert!(rendered);
 7379|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_frame_pending.get());
 7380|       |        drop(job_rx);
 7381|       |    }

 7407|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(2);
 7408|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(2);

 7410|       |        result_tx
 7411|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 7412|       |                svg_key: 99,
 7413|       |                texture_key: "other".to_string(),
 7414|       |                svg: Some("<svg width=\"1\" height=\"1\"></svg>".to_string()),
 7415|       |                rgba: None,
 7416|       |                size: None,
 7417|       |                error: None,
 7418|       |            })
 7419|       |            .expect("send svg");
 7420|       |
 7421|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 7422|       |        let input = test_raw_input(200.0, 120.0);
 7423|       |        let code = "timeline\n  title Demo";
 7424|       |        let mut rendered_first = false;
 7425|       |        let mut rendered_second = false;
 7426|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 7427|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 7428|       |                let rect = egui::Rect::from_min_size(egui::pos2(0.0, 0.0), egui::vec2(10.0, 80.0));
 7429|       |                ui.allocate_ui_at_rect(rect, |ui| {
 7430|       |                    rendered_first = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7431|       |                    rendered_second = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 7432|       |                });
 7433|       |            });
 7434|       |        });

 7436|       |        assert!(rendered_second);
 7437|       |        drop(job_rx);
 7438|       |    }

 7440|       |    #[test]
 7441|       |    fn test_mermaid_cache_insert_existing_key_and_empty_order() {
 7442|       |        let mut cache = LruCache::new(1);
 7443|       |        cache.insert(1u8, "one".to_string());
 7444|       |        cache.insert(1u8, "uno".to_string());
 7445|       |        assert_eq!(cache.get(&1), Some("uno".to_string()));
 7446|       |        assert!(cache.get(&9).is_none());
 7447|       |
 7448|       |        cache.insert(2u8, "two".to_string());
 7449|       |        assert!(cache.get(&1).is_none());
 7450|       |
 7451|       |        cache.entries.clear();
 7452|       |        cache.entries.insert(2u8, "two".to_string());
 7453|       |        cache.order.clear();
 7454|       |        cache.insert(3u8, "three".to_string());
 7455|       |        assert_eq!(cache.len(), 2);
 7456|       |    }

 7499|       |    #[test]
 7500|       |    fn test_fix_journey_section_text_skips_empty_style_parts() {
 7501|       |        let input = r#"<svg><text class="journey-section" style="fill:#000000;;stroke:#fff" x="0">Plan</text></svg>"#;
 7502|       |        let output = MermaidWorker::fix_journey_section_text(input, "#112233")
 7503|       |            .expect("journey text updated");
 7504|       |        assert!(output.contains("fill:#112233"));
 7505|       |        assert!(output.contains("stroke:#fff"));
 7506|       |    }

 7715|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7716|       |    #[test]
 7717|       |    fn test_patch_mermaid_js_applies_expected_replacements() {
 7718|       |        let js = concat!(
 7719|       |            "var hD=wRe();",
 7720|       |            "FY.prototype={constructor:FY,appendChild:function(i){return this._parent.insertBefore(i,this._next)},insertBefore:function(i,s){return this._parent.insertBefore(i,s)},querySelector:function(i){return this._parent.querySelector(i)},querySelectorAll:function(i){return this._parent.querySelectorAll(i)}};",
 7721|       |            "function FY(i,s){this.ownerDocument=i.ownerDocument,this.namespaceURI=i.namespaceURI,this._next=null,this._parent=i,this.__data__=s}",
 7722|       |            "u.text().split(/(\\s+|<br>)/).reverse()",
 7723|       |            "p=fWe({container:document.getElementById(\"cy\"),style:[{selector:\"edge\",style:{\"curve-style\":\"bezier\"}}]});",
 7724|       |            "p.layout({name:\"cose-bilkent\",quality:\"proof\",styleEnabled:!1,animate:!1}).run(),p.ready(v=>{Xe.info(\"Ready\",v),u(p)})",
 7725|       |            "const se=_.node().getBBox();"
 7726|       |        );
 7727|       |        let output = MermaidWorker::patch_mermaid_js(js);
 7728|       |        assert!(output.contains("sanitize:function"));
 7729|       |        assert!(output.contains("document.body"));
 7730|       |        assert!(output.contains("String(typeof u.text"));
 7731|       |        assert!(output.contains("__mdmdview_cytoscape_stub"));
 7732|       |        assert!(output.contains("breadthfirst"));
 7733|       |        assert!(output.contains("se.width=Math.max"));
 7734|       |    }
 7735|       |
 7736|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7737|       |    #[test]
 7738|       |    fn test_patch_mermaid_js_applies_mindmap_layout_fallback() {
 7739|       |        let js =
 7740|       |            "p.layout({name:\"cose-bilkent\",quality:\"proof\",styleEnabled:!1,animate:!1}).run()";
 7741|       |        let output = MermaidWorker::patch_mermaid_js(js);
 7742|       |        assert!(output.contains("breadthfirst"));
 7743|       |    }

 7755|       |    fn test_patch_mermaid_js_all_targets() {
 7756|       |        let js = concat!(
 7757|       |            "var hD=wRe();",
 7758|       |            "FY.prototype={constructor:FY,appendChild:function(i){return this._parent.insertBefore(i,this._next)},insertBefore:function(i,s){return this._parent.insertBefore(i,s)},querySelector:function(i){return this._parent.querySelector(i)},querySelectorAll:function(i){return this._parent.querySelectorAll(i)}};",
 7759|       |            "function FY(i,s){this.ownerDocument=i.ownerDocument,this.namespaceURI=i.namespaceURI,this._next=null,this._parent=i,this.__data__=s}",
 7760|       |            "u.text().split(/(\\s+|<br>)/).reverse()",
 7761|       |            "p=fWe({container:document.getElementById(\"cy\"),style:[{selector:\"edge\",style:{\"curve-style\":\"bezier\"}}]});",
 7762|       |            "p.layout({name:\"cose-bilkent\",quality:\"proof\",styleEnabled:!1,animate:!1}).run(),p.ready(v=>{Xe.info(\"Ready\",v),u(p)})",
 7763|       |            "const se=_.node().getBBox();"
 7764|       |        );
 7765|       |        let output = MermaidWorker::patch_mermaid_js(js);
 7766|       |        assert!(output.contains("sanitize:function"));
 7767|       |        assert!(output.contains("__mdmdview_cytoscape_stub"));
 7768|       |    }

 7811|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7812|       |    #[test]
 7813|       |    fn test_replace_and_upsert_attr_paths() {
 7814|       |        let tag = r#"<svg width="10" height="20">"#;
 7815|       |        let replaced = MermaidWorker::replace_attr(tag, "width", "99");
 7816|       |        assert!(replaced.contains("width=\"99\""));
 7817|       |        let unchanged = MermaidWorker::replace_attr(tag, "viewBox", "0 0 1 1");
 7818|       |        assert_eq!(unchanged, tag);
 7819|       |        let upsert_existing = MermaidWorker::upsert_attr(tag, "height", "42");
 7820|       |        assert!(upsert_existing.contains("height=\"42\""));
 7821|       |        let upsert_new = MermaidWorker::upsert_attr(tag, "viewBox", "0 0 1 1");
 7822|       |        assert!(upsert_new.contains("viewBox=\"0 0 1 1\""));
 7823|       |    }
 7824|       |
 7825|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7826|       |    #[test]
 7827|       |    fn test_strip_svg_attr_and_insert_svg_attr() {
 7828|       |        let svg = r#"<svg width="10" height="20"></svg>"#;
 7829|       |        let stripped = MermaidWorker::strip_svg_attr(svg, "width").expect("width removed");
 7830|       |        assert!(!stripped.contains("width=\"10\""));
 7831|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::strip_svg_attr(svg, "viewBox").is_none());
 7832|       |        let inserted = MermaidWorker::insert_svg_attr("<svg></svg>", "viewBox", "0 0 1 1");
 7833|       |        assert!(inserted.contains("viewBox=\"0 0 1 1\""));
 7834|       |    }

 7875|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 7876|       |    #[test]
 7877|       |    fn test_parse_viewbox_dims_and_format_dim() {
 7878|       |        assert_eq!(
 7879|       |            MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 100 200"),
 7880|       |            Some((100.0, 200.0))
 7881|       |        );
 7882|       |        assert_eq!(
 7883|       |            MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0,0,100,200"),
 7884|       |            Some((100.0, 200.0))
 7885|       |        );
 7886|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0,0,100,0").is_none());
 7887|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 -1 2").is_none());
 7888|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 NaN 2").is_none());
 7889|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 inf 2").is_none());
 7890|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("0 0 2 inf").is_none());
 7891|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::parse_viewbox_dims("bad").is_none());
 7892|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(10.0), "10");
 7893|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(10.5), "10.5");
 7894|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(0.0), "0");
 7895|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::format_dim(10.123), "10.123");
 7896|       |        let nan = MermaidWorker::format_dim(f32::NAN);
 7897|       |        assert!(!nan.contains('.'));
 7898|       |        assert!(nan.to_lowercase().contains("nan"));
 7899|       |    }
 7900|       |
