 8013|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8014|       |    #[test]
 8015|       |    fn test_enqueue_mermaid_job_disconnected() {
 8016|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 8017|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8018|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8019|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8020|       |        let request = MermaidRequest {
 8021|       |            svg_key: 1,
 8022|       |            texture_key: "t".to_string(),
 8023|       |            code: Some("graph TD; A-->B;".to_string()),
 8024|       |            svg: None,
 8025|       |            width_bucket: 120,
 8026|       |            scale_bucket: 100,
 8027|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 8028|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 8029|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 8030|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 8031|       |        };
 8032|       |        assert_eq!(
 8033|       |            renderer.enqueue_mermaid_job(request),
 8034|       |            Err(MermaidEnqueueError::Disconnected)
 8035|       |        );
 8036|       |    }

 8038|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8039|       |    #[test]
 8040|       |    fn test_render_block_enqueues_cached_svg() {
 8041|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8042|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 8043|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8044|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8045|       |        let code = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 8046|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8047|       |        renderer
 8048|       |            .mermaid_svg_cache
 8049|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8050|       |            .insert(svg_key, "<svg></svg>".to_string());
 8051|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8052|       |        let input = test_raw_input(240.0, 120.0);
 8053|       |        let mut rendered = false;
 8054|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8055|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8056|       |                rendered = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8057|       |            });
 8058|       |        });
 8059|       |        assert!(rendered);
 8060|       |        let request = job_rx
 8061|       |            .recv_timeout(std::time::Duration::from_secs(1))
 8062|       |            .expect("request");
 8063|       |        assert!(request.svg.is_some());
 8064|       |        assert!(request.code.is_none());
 8065|       |    }
 8066|       |
 8067|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8068|       |    #[test]
 8069|       |    fn test_spawn_mermaid_workers_reports_init_error() {
 8070|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 8071|       |        force_mermaid_worker_init_error_once();
 8072|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 8073|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8074|       |        let handles = MermaidRenderer::spawn_mermaid_workers(job_rx, result_tx);
 8075|       |        let request = MermaidRequest {
 8076|       |            svg_key: 2,
 8077|       |            texture_key: "t".to_string(),
 8078|       |            code: Some("graph TD; A-->B;".to_string()),
 8079|       |            svg: None,
 8080|       |            width_bucket: 120,
 8081|       |            scale_bucket: 100,
 8082|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 8083|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 8084|       |            bg: MermaidTheme::Default.bg_fill(),
 8085|       |            theme: MermaidTheme::Default,
 8086|       |        };
 8087|       |        job_tx.send(request).expect("send");
 8088|       |        let result = result_rx
 8089|       |            .recv_timeout(std::time::Duration::from_secs(1))
 8090|       |            .expect("result");
 8091|       |        assert!(result.error.is_some());
 8092|       |        drop(job_tx);
 8093|       |        for handle in handles {
 8094|       |            let _ = handle.join();
 8095|       |        }
 8096|       |    }
 8097|       |
 8098|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8099|       |    #[test]
 8100|       |    fn test_spawn_mermaid_workers_reports_spawn_error() {
 8101|       |        let _lock = env_lock();
 8102|       |        force_mermaid_thread_spawn_error_once();
 8103|       |        let (_job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 8104|       |        let (result_tx, _result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8105|       |        let expected_count = MermaidRenderer::mermaid_worker_count();
 8106|       |        let handles = MermaidRenderer::spawn_mermaid_workers(job_rx, result_tx);
 8107|       |        // One spawn was forced to fail, so we should have fewer than expected
 8108|       |        assert!(
 8109|       |            handles.len() < expected_count,
 8110|       |            "expected fewer than {} handles due to forced spawn error, got {}",
 8111|       |            expected_count,
 8112|       |            handles.len()
 8113|       |        );
 8114|       |    }

 8116|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8117|       |    #[test]
 8118|       |    fn test_mermaid_worker_init_error_stages() {
 8119|       |        let fontdb = test_fontdb();
 8120|       |
 8121|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(1);
 8122|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8123|       |            .err()
 8124|       |            .expect("stage 1 err");
 8125|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid text measure init error"));
 8126|       |
 8127|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(2);
 8128|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8129|       |            .err()
 8130|       |            .expect("stage 2 err");
 8131|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid text measure init error"));
 8132|       |
 8133|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(3);
 8134|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8135|       |            .err()
 8136|       |            .expect("stage 3 err");
 8137|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid DOM shim"));
 8138|       |
 8139|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(4);
 8140|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8141|       |            .err()
 8142|       |            .expect("stage 4 err");
 8143|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid JS"));
 8144|       |
 8145|       |        force_mermaid_init_error_once(5);
 8146|       |        let err = MermaidWorker::new(0, Arc::clone(&fontdb))
 8147|       |            .err()
 8148|       |            .expect("stage 5 err");
 8149|       |        assert!(err.contains("Mermaid init"));
 8150|       |    }

 8163|       |    #[test]
 8164|       |    fn test_mermaid_runtime_flag_mismatch_restores() {
 8165|       |        let handle = std::thread::spawn(|| {
 8166|       |            force_mermaid_runtime_error_once();
 8167|       |        });
 8168|       |        handle.join().expect("flag thread");
 8169|       |
 8170|       |        let _ = runtime_new_for_test().expect("runtime ok");
 8171|       |
 8172|       |        let mut guard = FORCE_MERMAID_RUNTIME_ERROR
 8173|       |            .lock()
 8174|       |            .expect("mermaid runtime flag lock");
 8175|       |        *guard = None;
 8176|       |    }

 8244|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8245|       |    #[test]
 8246|       |    fn test_svg_helper_early_returns() {
 8247|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::normalize_svg_size("<svg"), "<svg");
 8248|       |        assert_eq!(
 8249|       |            MermaidWorker::normalize_svg_size("<svg viewBox=\"bad\">"),
 8250|       |            "<svg viewBox=\"bad\">"
 8251|       |        );
 8252|       |        assert_eq!(
 8253|       |            MermaidWorker::replace_attr("<svg width=\"100", "width", "200"),
 8254|       |            "<svg width=\"100"
 8255|       |        );
 8256|       |        assert_eq!(
 8257|       |            MermaidWorker::upsert_attr("<svg width=\"100\"", "height", "200"),
 8258|       |            "<svg width=\"100\""
 8259|       |        );
 8260|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::flatten_svg_switches("<switch").is_none());
 8261|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_journey_section_text("<text journey-section", "#fff").is_none());
 8262|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_state_end_circles("<svg><g class=\"state-end\"").is_none());
 8263|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_state_end_circles("<svg><g class=\"state-end\"></g").is_none());
 8264|       |        assert!(MermaidWorker::fix_er_attribute_fills("<rect class=\"attributeBoxOdd\"").is_none());
 8265|       |        assert_eq!(
 8266|       |            MermaidWorker::replace_svg_attr("<svg>", "width", "1"),
 8267|       |            "<svg>"
 8268|       |        );
 8269|       |        assert_eq!(
 8270|       |            MermaidWorker::replace_svg_attr("<svg width=\"100>", "width", "1"),
 8271|       |            "<svg width=\"100>"
 8272|       |        );
 8273|       |        assert_eq!(
 8274|       |            MermaidWorker::insert_svg_attr("no svg", "width", "1"),
 8275|       |            "no svg"
 8276|       |        );
 8277|       |    }

 8283|       |    #[test]
 8284|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_basic_italic() {
 8285|       |        let input = "<text>&lt;i&gt;italic&lt;/i&gt;</text>";
 8286|       |        let expected = "<text><tspan font-style=\"italic\">italic</tspan></text>";
 8287|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8288|       |    }
 8289|       |
 8290|       |    #[test]
 8291|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_basic_bold() {
 8292|       |        let input = "<text>&lt;b&gt;bold&lt;/b&gt;</text>";
 8293|       |        let expected = "<text><tspan font-weight=\"bold\">bold</tspan></text>";
 8294|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8295|       |    }

 8299|       |        let input = "<text>&lt;em&gt;emphasis&lt;/em&gt;</text>";
 8300|       |        let expected = "<text><tspan font-style=\"italic\">emphasis</tspan></text>";
 8301|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8302|       |    }

 8307|       |        let expected = "<text><tspan font-weight=\"bold\">strong</tspan></text>";

 8309|       |    }

 8311|       |    #[test]
 8312|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_nested_tags() {
 8313|       |        let input = "<text>&lt;b&gt;&lt;i&gt;both&lt;/i&gt;&lt;/b&gt;</text>";
 8314|       |        let expected =
 8315|       |            "<text><tspan font-weight=\"bold\"><tspan font-style=\"italic\">both</tspan></tspan></text>";
 8316|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8317|       |    }
 8318|       |
 8319|       |    #[test]
 8320|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_mixed_content() {
 8321|       |        let input = "<text>normal &lt;i&gt;italic&lt;/i&gt; normal</text>";
 8322|       |        let expected = "<text>normal <tspan font-style=\"italic\">italic</tspan> normal</text>";
 8323|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8324|       |    }
 8325|       |
 8326|       |    #[test]
 8327|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_unclosed_tag() {
 8328|       |        let input = "<text>&lt;i&gt;unclosed</text>";
 8329|       |        let expected = "<text><tspan font-style=\"italic\">unclosed</tspan></text>";
 8330|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8331|       |    }

 8336|       |        let expected = "<text>text</text>";
 8337|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8338|       |    }

 8341|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_unknown_tag_passthrough() {
 8342|       |        // Unknown tags (like <span>, or SVG elements like <tspan>) pass through unchanged
 8343|       |        // This is essential to preserve existing SVG structure
 8344|       |        let input = "<text>&lt;span&gt;text&lt;/span&gt;</text>";
 8345|       |        let expected = "<text><span>text</span></text>";
 8346|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input), expected);
 8347|       |    }

 8351|       |        // Critical: existing SVG tspan elements must be preserved unchanged
 8352|       |        // This is the real-world case from Mermaid output
 8353|       |        let input =
 8354|       |            r#"<text><tspan xml:space="preserve" dy="1em" x="0" class="row">Label</tspan></text>"#;
 8355|       |        let expected =
 8356|       |            r#"<text><tspan xml:space="preserve" dy="1em" x="0" class="row">Label</tspan></text>"#;

 8358|       |    }

 8364|       |        let result = MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input);
 8365|       |        assert!(result.contains(r#"<tspan dy="1em">"#)); // Preserve outer tspan
 8366|       |        assert!(result.contains(r#"font-weight="bold""#)); // Convert HTML bold
 8367|       |    }

 8427|       |    fn test_html_to_tspan_mismatched_tags() {
 8428|       |        // <b>a<i>b</b>c</i> - close b while i is open
 8429|       |        let input = "<text>&lt;b&gt;a&lt;i&gt;b&lt;/b&gt;c&lt;/i&gt;</text>";
 8430|       |        // Expected: close i and b at </b>, reopen i for c, close i at </i>
 8431|       |        let result = MermaidWorker::convert_html_tags_to_tspan(input);
 8432|       |        // Should contain proper tspan nesting
 8433|       |        assert!(result.contains("<tspan font-weight=\"bold\">"));
 8434|       |        assert!(result.contains("<tspan font-style=\"italic\">"));
 8435|       |        // Should not contain escaped tags
 8436|       |        assert!(!result.contains("&lt;b&gt;"));
 8437|       |        assert!(!result.contains("&lt;i&gt;"));
 8438|       |    }

 8551|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8552|       |    #[test]
 8553|       |    fn test_release_gpu_textures_preserves_svg_cache() {
 8554|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8555|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8556|       |
 8557|       |        // Create a test texture and add to texture cache
 8558|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8559|       |        let input = test_raw_input(800.0, 600.0);
 8560|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8561|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8562|       |                let image = egui::ColorImage::new([2, 2], Color32::WHITE);
 8563|       |                let texture =
 8564|       |                    ui.ctx()
 8565|       |                        .load_texture("test-mermaid", image, egui::TextureOptions::default());
 8566|       |
 8567|       |                // Insert into texture cache
 8568|       |                renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut().insert(
 8569|       |                    "test-texture-key".to_string(),
 8570|       |                    MermaidTextureEntry {
 8571|       |                        texture,
 8572|       |                        size: [100, 100],
 8573|       |                    },
 8574|       |                );
 8575|       |            });
 8576|       |        });
 8577|       |
 8578|       |        // Insert into SVG cache
 8579|       |        let svg_key = hash_str("graph TD; A-->B;");
 8580|       |        renderer
 8581|       |            .mermaid_svg_cache
 8582|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8583|       |            .insert(svg_key, "<svg>test</svg>".to_string());
 8584|       |
 8585|       |        // Verify both caches are populated
 8586|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow().len(), 1);
 8587|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow().len(), 1);
 8588|       |
 8589|       |        // Call release_gpu_textures
 8590|       |        renderer.release_gpu_textures();
 8591|       |
 8592|       |        // Assert texture cache is EMPTY
 8593|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow().len(), 0);
 8594|       |
 8595|       |        // Assert SVG cache is NOT EMPTY (still has entries)
 8596|       |        assert_eq!(renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow().len(), 1);
 8597|       |    }
 8598|       |
 8599|       |    // ---- Resize debounce tests ----
 8600|       |
 8601|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8602|       |    #[test]
 8603|       |    fn test_parse_width_from_texture_key() {
 8604|       |        let key = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(0xABCD, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8605|       |        assert_eq!(
 8606|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key(&key),
 8607|       |            Some(320)
 8608|       |        );
 8609|       |
 8610|       |        let key2 = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(0x1234, 1024, 200, [255, 255, 255, 255]);
 8611|       |        assert_eq!(
 8612|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key(&key2),
 8613|       |            Some(1024)
 8614|       |        );
 8615|       |
 8616|       |        // Malformed keys
 8617|       |        assert_eq!(
 8618|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key("no-w-here"),
 8619|       |            None
 8620|       |        );
 8621|       |        assert_eq!(
 8622|       |            MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key("mermaid:abc:wNOT_A_NUM:s100:bg00000000"),
 8623|       |            None
 8624|       |        );
 8625|       |        assert_eq!(MermaidRenderer::parse_width_from_texture_key(":w32"), None);
 8626|       |        // no trailing ':'
 8627|       |    }

 8629|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8630|       |    #[test]
 8631|       |    fn test_latest_texture_index_updated_on_store() {
 8632|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8633|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8634|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8635|       |        let input = test_raw_input(800.0, 600.0);
 8636|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8637|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8638|       |                let image = egui::ColorImage::new([2, 2], Color32::WHITE);
 8639|       |                let tex =
 8640|       |                    ui.ctx()
 8641|       |                        .load_texture("test-latest", image, egui::TextureOptions::default());
 8642|       |
 8643|       |                let svg_key: u64 = 42;
 8644|       |                renderer.store_mermaid_texture("key_v1", tex.clone(), [2, 2], svg_key);
 8645|       |                assert_eq!(
 8646|       |                    renderer.mermaid_latest_texture.borrow().get(&svg_key),
 8647|       |                    Some(&"key_v1".to_string())
 8648|       |                );
 8649|       |
 8650|       |                renderer.store_mermaid_texture("key_v2", tex.clone(), [4, 4], svg_key);
 8651|       |                assert_eq!(
 8652|       |                    renderer.mermaid_latest_texture.borrow().get(&svg_key),
 8653|       |                    Some(&"key_v2".to_string())
 8654|       |                );
 8655|       |            });
 8656|       |        });
 8657|       |    }
 8658|       |
 8659|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8660|       |    #[test]
 8661|       |    fn test_stale_result_skips_gpu_upload() {
 8662|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 8663|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8664|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8665|       |
 8666|       |        let svg_key: u64 = 100;
 8667|       |        let texture_key_old = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8668|       |        let _texture_key_new = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 640, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8669|       |
 8670|       |        // Set wanted bucket to 640 (different from result's 320)
 8671|       |        renderer
 8672|       |            .mermaid_wanted_bucket
 8673|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8674|       |            .insert(svg_key, 640);
 8675|       |
 8676|       |        renderer
 8677|       |            .mermaid_pending
 8678|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8679|       |            .insert(texture_key_old.clone());
 8680|       |
 8681|       |        result_tx
 8682|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 8683|       |                svg_key,
 8684|       |                texture_key: texture_key_old.clone(),
 8685|       |                svg: Some("<svg>test</svg>".to_string()),
 8686|       |                rgba: Some(vec![255, 255, 255, 255]),
 8687|       |                size: Some((1, 1)),
 8688|       |                error: None,
 8689|       |            })
 8690|       |            .expect("send");
 8691|       |
 8692|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 8693|       |
 8694|       |        // SVG should be cached (always cached regardless of staleness)
 8695|       |        assert!(renderer
 8696|       |            .mermaid_svg_cache
 8697|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8698|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 8699|       |            .is_some());
 8700|       |
 8701|       |        // Texture should NOT be uploaded (stale result)
 8702|       |        assert!(renderer
 8703|       |            .mermaid_textures
 8704|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8705|       |            .get(&texture_key_old)
 8706|       |            .is_none());
 8707|       |
 8708|       |        // Pending should be cleared
 8709|       |        assert!(!renderer.mermaid_pending.borrow().contains(&texture_key_old));
 8710|       |    }
 8711|       |
 8712|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8713|       |    #[test]
 8714|       |    fn test_stale_result_caches_svg() {
 8715|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 8716|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8717|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8718|       |
 8719|       |        let svg_key: u64 = 200;
 8720|       |        let texture_key = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8721|       |
 8722|       |        // Wanted bucket differs from result
 8723|       |        renderer
 8724|       |            .mermaid_wanted_bucket
 8725|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8726|       |            .insert(svg_key, 512);
 8727|       |
 8728|       |        renderer
 8729|       |            .mermaid_pending
 8730|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8731|       |            .insert(texture_key.clone());
 8732|       |
 8733|       |        result_tx
 8734|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 8735|       |                svg_key,
 8736|       |                texture_key: texture_key.clone(),
 8737|       |                svg: Some("<svg>stale-but-cached</svg>".to_string()),
 8738|       |                rgba: None,
 8739|       |                size: None,
 8740|       |                error: None,
 8741|       |            })
 8742|       |            .expect("send");
 8743|       |
 8744|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 8745|       |
 8746|       |        // SVG cached even for stale result
 8747|       |        let cached_svg = renderer.mermaid_svg_cache.borrow_mut().get(&svg_key);
 8748|       |        assert_eq!(cached_svg, Some("<svg>stale-but-cached</svg>".to_string()));
 8749|       |    }
 8750|       |
 8751|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8752|       |    #[test]
 8753|       |    fn test_stale_result_caches_error() {
 8754|       |        let (result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(10);
 8755|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(None, result_rx);
 8756|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8757|       |
 8758|       |        let svg_key: u64 = 300;
 8759|       |        let texture_key = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(svg_key, 320, 100, [0, 0, 0, 255]);
 8760|       |
 8761|       |        // Wanted bucket differs
 8762|       |        renderer
 8763|       |            .mermaid_wanted_bucket
 8764|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8765|       |            .insert(svg_key, 640);
 8766|       |
 8767|       |        renderer
 8768|       |            .mermaid_pending
 8769|       |            .borrow_mut()
 8770|       |            .insert(texture_key.clone());
 8771|       |
 8772|       |        // Send a result with error but no SVG (QuickJS failure)
 8773|       |        result_tx
 8774|       |            .send(MermaidResult {
 8775|       |                svg_key,
 8776|       |                texture_key: texture_key.clone(),
 8777|       |                svg: None,
 8778|       |                rgba: None,
 8779|       |                size: None,
 8780|       |                error: Some("QuickJS crashed".to_string()),
 8781|       |            })
 8782|       |            .expect("send");
 8783|       |
 8784|       |        renderer.poll_mermaid_results(&ctx);
 8785|       |
 8786|       |        // Error should be cached even for stale result (prevents infinite re-render)
 8787|       |        assert!(renderer.mermaid_errors.borrow_mut().get(&svg_key).is_some());
 8788|       |    }
 8789|       |

 8791|       |    #[test]
 8792|       |    fn test_first_render_no_debounce_delay() {
 8793|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(4);
 8794|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(4);
 8795|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8796|       |
 8797|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8798|       |        let code = "graph TD; First-->Render;";
 8799|       |
 8800|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8801|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8802|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8803|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8804|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8805|       |            });
 8806|       |        });
 8807|       |
 8808|       |        // Job should be enqueued immediately (no debounce on first render)
 8809|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 8810|       |
 8811|       |        // Debounce entry should exist after successful enqueue
 8812|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8813|       |        assert!(renderer
 8814|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 8815|       |            .borrow()
 8816|       |            .contains_key(&svg_key));
 8817|       |
 8818|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8819|       |    }

 8823|       |    fn test_first_render_queue_full_no_debounce_entry() {
 8824|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(1);
 8825|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(1);
 8826|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx.clone()), result_rx);
 8827|       |
 8828|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8829|       |
 8830|       |        // Fill the queue first
 8831|       |        let filler = MermaidRequest {
 8832|       |            svg_key: 1,
 8833|       |            texture_key: "filler".to_string(),
 8834|       |            code: Some("graph TD; Fill-->Queue;".to_string()),
 8835|       |            svg: None,
 8836|       |            width_bucket: 32,
 8837|       |            scale_bucket: MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0),
 8838|       |            viewport_width: 120,
 8839|       |            viewport_height: 120,
 8840|       |            bg: theme.bg_fill(),
 8841|       |            theme,
 8842|       |        };
 8843|       |        job_tx.send(filler).expect("fill queue");
 8844|       |
 8845|       |        let code = "graph TD; New-->Diagram;";
 8846|       |
 8847|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8848|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8849|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8850|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8851|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8852|       |            });
 8853|       |        });
 8854|       |
 8855|       |        // No debounce entry should be created on QueueFull
 8856|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8857|       |        assert!(!renderer
 8858|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce

 8860|       |            .contains_key(&svg_key));

 8863|       |    }

 8865|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 8866|       |    #[test]
 8867|       |    fn test_debounce_missing_timer_is_reinitialized() {
 8868|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 8869|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 8870|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8871|       |
 8872|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8873|       |        let code = "graph TD; MissingTimer-->Reset;";
 8874|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8875|       |
 8876|       |        renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow_mut().insert(
 8877|       |            svg_key,
 8878|       |            WidthDebounce {
 8879|       |                last_enqueued_bucket: MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(400.0),
 8880|       |                last_seen_bucket: MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(400.0),
 8881|       |                bucket_changed_at: None,
 8882|       |            },
 8883|       |        );
 8884|       |
 8885|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8886|       |        let input = test_raw_input(700.0, 300.0);
 8887|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8888|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8889|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8890|       |            });
 8891|       |        });
 8892|       |
 8893|       |        let debounce = renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow();
 8894|       |        let entry = debounce.get(&svg_key).expect("debounce entry");
 8895|       |        assert_eq!(entry.last_seen_bucket, MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(700.0));
 8896|       |        assert!(entry.bucket_changed_at.is_some());
 8897|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 0);
 8898|       |
 8899|       |        drop(job_rx);
 8900|       |    }

 8941|       |    #[test]
 8942|       |    fn test_debounce_missing_timer_prefers_stale_texture_when_available() {
 8943|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 8944|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 8945|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 8946|       |
 8947|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 8948|       |        let code = "graph TD; Stale-->Shown;";
 8949|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 8950|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 8951|       |
 8952|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 8953|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 8954|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8955|       |                let width_bucket = MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(ui.available_width());
 8956|       |                let scale_bucket = MermaidRenderer::scale_bucket(1.0);
 8957|       |                let texture_key = MermaidRenderer::texture_key(
 8958|       |                    svg_key,
 8959|       |                    width_bucket,
 8960|       |                    scale_bucket,
 8961|       |                    theme.bg_fill(),
 8962|       |                );
 8963|       |                let image = egui::ColorImage::new([2, 2], Color32::WHITE);
 8964|       |                let texture = ui.ctx().load_texture(
 8965|       |                    "mermaid-stale-during-debounce",
 8966|       |                    image,
 8967|       |                    egui::TextureOptions::default(),
 8968|       |                );
 8969|       |
 8970|       |                renderer.mermaid_textures.borrow_mut().insert(
 8971|       |                    texture_key.clone(),
 8972|       |                    MermaidTextureEntry {
 8973|       |                        texture,
 8974|       |                        size: [640, 320],
 8975|       |                    },
 8976|       |                );
 8977|       |                renderer
 8978|       |                    .mermaid_latest_texture
 8979|       |                    .borrow_mut()
 8980|       |                    .insert(svg_key, texture_key);
 8981|       |                renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow_mut().insert(
 8982|       |                    svg_key,
 8983|       |                    WidthDebounce {
 8984|       |                        last_enqueued_bucket: width_bucket,
 8985|       |                        last_seen_bucket: width_bucket,
 8986|       |                        bucket_changed_at: None,
 8987|       |                    },
 8988|       |                );
 8989|       |            });
 8990|       |        });
 8991|       |
 8992|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(700.0, 300.0);
 8993|       |        let mut rendered = false;
 8994|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 8995|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 8996|       |                rendered = renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 8997|       |            });
 8998|       |        });
 8999|       |
 9000|       |        assert!(rendered);
 9001|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 0);
 9002|       |        assert!(renderer
 9003|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 9004|       |            .borrow()
 9005|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 9006|       |            .and_then(|entry| entry.bucket_changed_at)
 9007|       |            .is_some());
 9008|       |
 9009|       |        drop(job_rx);
 9010|       |    }

 9081|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 9082|       |    #[test]
 9083|       |    fn test_debounce_suppresses_enqueue_during_resize() {
 9084|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 9085|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 9086|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 9087|       |
 9088|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 9089|       |        let code = "graph TD; A-->B;";
 9090|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 9091|       |
 9092|       |        // First render at width 400 — should enqueue immediately
 9093|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 9094|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 9095|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 9096|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9097|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9098|       |            });
 9099|       |        });
 9100|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 9101|       |
 9102|       |        // Simulate width change to 600 (different bucket) within debounce window
 9103|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(600.0, 300.0);
 9104|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 9105|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9106|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9107|       |            });
 9108|       |        });
 9109|       |
 9110|       |        // Should NOT have enqueued a second job (debounce active)
 9111|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 9112|       |
 9113|       |        // Debounce entry should still point to the first enqueued width.
 9114|       |        // The second render at 600px was suppressed by debounce.
 9115|       |        let debounce = renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow();
 9116|       |        let entry = debounce.get(&svg_key).expect("debounce entry should exist");
 9117|       |        // last_seen_bucket should have moved to the new width
 9118|       |        assert_ne!(entry.last_seen_bucket, entry.last_enqueued_bucket);
 9119|       |
 9120|       |        drop(job_rx);
 9121|       |    }
 9122|       |
 9123|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 9124|       |    #[test]
 9125|       |    fn test_debounce_fires_after_cooldown() {
 9126|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 9127|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 9128|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 9129|       |
 9130|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 9131|       |        let code = "graph TD; C-->D;";
 9132|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 9133|       |
 9134|       |        // First render at width 400
 9135|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 9136|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 9137|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 9138|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9139|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9140|       |            });
 9141|       |        });
 9142|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 9143|       |
 9144|       |        // Simulate width change to 600 — triggers debounce
 9145|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(600.0, 300.0);
 9146|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 9147|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9148|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9149|       |            });
 9150|       |        });
 9151|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1); // Still just 1 (debounced)
 9152|       |
 9153|       |        // Force the debounce timer to appear expired by backdating bucket_changed_at
 9154|       |        {
 9155|       |            let mut debounce = renderer.mermaid_width_debounce.borrow_mut();
 9156|       |            let entry = debounce.get_mut(&svg_key).unwrap();
 9157|       |            entry.bucket_changed_at = Some(
 9158|       |                Instant::now() - std::time::Duration::from_millis(MERMAID_RESIZE_DEBOUNCE_MS + 50),
 9159|       |            );
 9160|       |        }
 9161|       |
 9162|       |        // Re-render at width 600 — debounce should have expired, enqueue fires
 9163|       |        let input3 = test_raw_input(600.0, 300.0);
 9164|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input3, |ctx| {
 9165|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9166|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9167|       |            });
 9168|       |        });
 9169|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 2); // Now 2 — debounce expired
 9170|       |
 9171|       |        drop(job_rx);
 9172|       |    }

 9175|       |    #[test]
 9176|       |    fn test_debounce_same_bucket_clears_timer_when_texture_evicted() {
 9177|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 9178|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 9179|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 9180|       |
 9181|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 9182|       |        let code = "graph TD; Evicted-->Texture;";

 9185|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 9186|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 9187|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {

 9189|       |                let width_bucket = MermaidRenderer::width_bucket(ui.available_width());

 9210|       |    #[cfg(feature = "mermaid-quickjs")]
 9211|       |    #[test]
 9212|       |    fn test_debounce_resets_on_continued_resize() {
 9213|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 9214|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 9215|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 9216|       |
 9217|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 9218|       |        let code = "graph TD; E-->F;";
 9219|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 9220|       |
 9221|       |        // First render at width 400
 9222|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();
 9223|       |        let input = test_raw_input(400.0, 300.0);
 9224|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {
 9225|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9226|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9227|       |            });
 9228|       |        });
 9229|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 9230|       |
 9231|       |        // Width change A?B
 9232|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(500.0, 300.0);
 9233|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 9234|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9235|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9236|       |            });
 9237|       |        });
 9238|       |        let changed_at_b = renderer
 9239|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 9240|       |            .borrow()
 9241|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 9242|       |            .unwrap()
 9243|       |            .bucket_changed_at
 9244|       |            .unwrap();
 9245|       |
 9246|       |        // Width change B?C — timer should reset
 9247|       |        std::thread::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_millis(10));
 9248|       |        let input3 = test_raw_input(700.0, 300.0);
 9249|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input3, |ctx| {
 9250|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9251|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);

 9253|       |        });

 9255|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 9256|       |            .borrow()

 9258|       |            .unwrap()
 9259|       |            .bucket_changed_at
 9260|       |            .unwrap();

 9263|       |        assert!(changed_at_c > changed_at_b);
 9264|       |

 9266|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);

 9268|       |        drop(job_rx);

 9273|       |    fn test_debounce_trailing_edge_timer_reset() {
 9274|       |        let (job_tx, job_rx) = bounded(16);
 9275|       |        let (_result_tx, result_rx) = bounded(16);
 9276|       |        let renderer = test_renderer_with_channels(Some(job_tx), result_rx);
 9277|       |
 9278|       |        let theme = MermaidTheme::Default;
 9279|       |        let code = "graph TD; G-->H;";
 9280|       |        let svg_key = hash_str(&format!("{}:{}", theme.theme_name(), code));
 9281|       |
 9282|       |        // First render at width 400
 9283|       |        let ctx = egui::Context::default();

 9285|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input, |ctx| {

 9287|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9288|       |            });
 9289|       |        });
 9290|       |
 9291|       |        // Width change to 500
 9292|       |        let input2 = test_raw_input(500.0, 300.0);
 9293|       |        let _ = ctx.run(input2, |ctx| {
 9294|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {
 9295|       |                renderer.render_block(ui, code, 1.0, 14.0, theme);
 9296|       |            });
 9297|       |        });
 9298|       |

 9306|       |        }
 9307|       |

 9309|       |        let input3 = test_raw_input(600.0, 300.0);

 9311|       |            egui::CentralPanel::default().show(ctx, |ui| {

 9313|       |            });
 9314|       |        });
 9315|       |

 9317|       |        let changed_at = renderer
 9318|       |            .mermaid_width_debounce
 9319|       |            .borrow()
 9320|       |            .get(&svg_key)
 9321|       |            .unwrap()
 9322|       |            .bucket_changed_at

 9325|       |

 9327|       |        assert_eq!(job_rx.len(), 1);
 9328|       |
 9329|       |        drop(job_rx);
 9330|       |    }

C:\language\mdmdview\src\pikchr_renderer.rs:
    1|       |//! Pikchr diagram renderer.
    2|       |//!
    3|       |//! Renders Pikchr markup to SVG using the embedded pikchr C library,
    4|       |//! then rasterizes SVG to egui textures via usvg/resvg. Heavy rendering
    5|       |//! work (Pikchr C call + SVG rasterization) runs on a dedicated worker
    6|       |//! thread; the main thread only handles the cheap GPU texture upload.
    7|       |//!
    8|       |//! Key components:
    9|       |//! - `PikchrRenderer` struct: holds font database, caches, and worker channels
   10|       |//! - `LruCache<K, V>`: generic LRU cache (shared module in lru_cache.rs)
   11|       |//! - `render_pikchr_to_svg()`: static method wrapping the pikchr C library
   12|       |//! - `rasterize_svg()`: pure function: SVG string -> RGBA bytes (runs on worker)
   13|       |//! - `poll_results()`: drains worker results, uploads textures to GPU (main thread)
   14|       |//!
   15|       |//! This module is conditionally compiled behind `#[cfg(feature = "pikchr")]`.
   16|       |//! It integrates with `MarkdownRenderer` following the same public API pattern
   17|       |//! as `MermaidRenderer` (render_block, begin_frame, has_pending, release_gpu_textures).
   18|       |
   19|       |use std::cell::RefCell;
   20|       |use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet};
   21|       |use std::sync::Arc;
   22|       |use std::time::{Duration, Instant};
   23|       |
   24|       |use crossbeam_channel::{Receiver, Sender, TrySendError};
   25|       |
   26|       |use crate::lru_cache::{hash_str, LruCache};
   27|       |use crate::ThemeColors;
   28|       |
   29|       |// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   30|       |// Cache capacity constants
   31|       |// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   32|       |
   33|       |const PIKCHR_TEXTURE_CACHE_CAPACITY: usize = 64;
   34|       |const PIKCHR_SVG_CACHE_CAPACITY: usize = 64;
   35|       |const PIKCHR_ERROR_CACHE_CAPACITY: usize = 32;
   36|       |/// Trailing-edge debounce cooldown for resize. During window resize, suppress
   37|       |/// rasterization enqueue and show the last rendered texture scaled to fit.
   38|       |/// Only enqueue a new rasterization job once the width stabilizes for this
   39|       |/// duration.
   40|       |const RESIZE_DEBOUNCE_MS: u64 = 150;
   41|       |/// Maximum rasterized dimension (width or height) in pixels.
   42|       |/// Matches the cap used by mermaid_renderer.
   43|       |const MAX_RASTER_SIDE: u32 = 4096;
   44|       |/// Rasterization supersample factor. Pikchr SVGs have compact viewBox
   45|       |/// dimensions (a single box is ~67x35 units), so rasterizing at 1x
   46|       |/// produces textures with insufficient pixel density for crisp text.
   47|       |/// 2x gives 4x the pixels, making anti-aliased text and thin lines
   48|       |/// look sharp -- the standard "retina rendering" approach.
   49|       |const PIKCHR_SUPERSAMPLE: f32 = 2.0;
   50|       |/// Bounded channel capacity for job and result channels. With debounce
   51|       |/// suppressing enqueue during resize, at most one job per diagram is
   52|       |/// enqueued after the debounce expires. A document with ~6-8 diagrams
   53|       |/// fits within 8 slots. The bounded channel provides natural backpressure
   54|       |/// if the worker falls behind.
   55|       |const CHANNEL_CAPACITY: usize = 8;
   56|       |
   57|       |// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   58|       |// Channel type aliases
   59|       |// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   60|       |
   61|       |type JobSender = Sender<RasterJob>;
   62|       |type JobReceiver = Receiver<RasterJob>;
   63|       |type ResultSender = Sender<RasterResult>;
   64|       |type ResultReceiver = Receiver<RasterResult>;
   65|       |
   66|       |// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   67|       |// RasterJob / RasterResult
   68|       |// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   69|       |
   70|       |/// Job sent from main thread to worker.
   71|       |struct RasterJob {
   72|       |    /// Hash of the source code (for cache keying).
   73|       |    code_hash: u64,
   74|       |    /// Composite texture cache key (includes width, scale, theme).
   75|       |    texture_key: String,
   76|       |    /// Source code to render. None if SVG is provided directly.
   77|       |    code: Option<String>,
   78|       |    /// Pre-cached SVG string. If present, skip source->SVG step.
   79|       |    svg: Option<String>,
   80|       |    /// Dark mode flag (affects source->SVG for Pikchr).
   81|       |    dark_mode: bool,
   82|       |    /// Width bucket (32px quantized) for rasterization scaling.
   83|       |    width_bucket: u32,
   84|       |    /// Scale bucket (integer %, e.g., 100 = 1.0x zoom).
   85|       |    scale_bucket: u32,
   86|       |}
   87|       |
   88|       |/// Result sent from worker back to main thread.
   89|       |struct RasterResult {
   90|       |    /// Hash of the source code (for cache keying).
   91|       |    code_hash: u64,
   92|       |    /// Composite texture cache key.
   93|       |    texture_key: String,
   94|       |    /// Dark mode flag (copied from job, for SVG cache key computation).
   95|       |    dark_mode: bool,
   96|       |    /// SVG string (always set on success, for caching).
   97|       |    svg: Option<String>,
   98|       |    /// RGBA pixel data from rasterization.
   99|       |    rgba: Option<Vec<u8>>,
  100|       |    /// Raster dimensions in actual pixels (for GPU upload).
  101|       |    raster_size: Option<[usize; 2]>,
  102|       |    /// Display dimensions in logical pixels (for UI layout).
  103|       |    display_size: Option<[u32; 2]>,
  104|       |    /// Error message (set on failure, mutually exclusive with rgba).
  105|       |    error: Option<String>,
  106|       |}
  107|       |
  108|       |/// Intermediate output from `rasterize_svg`, before GPU upload.
  109|       |struct RasterOutput {
  110|       |    rgba: Vec<u8>,
  111|       |    raster_size: [usize; 2],
  112|       |    display_size: [u32; 2],
  113|       |}

  119|       |/// A cached rasterized Pikchr diagram texture with its display dimensions.
  120|       |#[derive(Clone)]
  121|       |struct PikchrTextureEntry {
  122|       |    /// GPU texture handle (Clone wraps Arc internally).
  123|       |    texture: egui::TextureHandle,
  124|       |    /// Display dimensions in logical pixels [width, height].
  125|       |    /// The actual texture is larger by `PIKCHR_SUPERSAMPLE` for crisp rendering.
  126|       |    display_size: [u32; 2],

  133|       |/// Composite SVG cache key: embeds both the source code hash and dark_mode flag.
  134|       |/// Dark mode produces different SVG output for the same source code.
  135|     30|fn svg_cache_key(code_hash: u64, dark_mode: bool) -> u128 {
  136|     30|    ((code_hash as u128) << 1) | (dark_mode as u128)
  137|     30|}
  138|       |
  139|       |/// Quantize a width value to 32-pixel buckets to avoid cache thrashing
  140|       |/// when the panel width changes by a few pixels (e.g., during resize).
  141|       |/// Returns the bucket midpoint as u32.
  142|     29|fn bucket_width(width: f32) -> u32 {
  143|     29|    let bucket = (width / 32.0).round() as u32;
  144|     29|    bucket * 32
  145|     29|}
  146|       |
  147|       |/// Quantize a UI scale factor to integer percentage buckets.
  148|       |/// e.g., 1.0 -> 100, 1.25 -> 125, 1.5 -> 150.
  149|       |/// Matches the bucketing strategy in mermaid_renderer.rs.
  150|     22|fn bucket_scale(scale: f32) -> u32 {
  151|     22|    (scale * 100.0).round() as u32
  152|     22|}
